32 using namespace cytnx;
34 class UniTensorType_class {
35 public:
36 enum : int { Void = -99, Dense = 0, Sparse = 1, Block = 2, BlockFermionic = 3 };
37 std::string getname(const int &ut_type) const;
38 };

57 extern UniTensorType_class UTenType;
58
60 // class DenseUniTensor;
61 // class SparseUniTensor;
62 class UniTensor_base : public intrusive_ptr_base<UniTensor_base> {
63 public:
64 int uten_type_id; // the unitensor type id.
65 bool _is_braket_form;
66 bool _is_tag;
67 bool _is_diag;
68 cytnx_int64 _rowrank;
69 std::string _name;
70 std::vector<std::string> _labels;
71 std::vector<Bond> _bonds;
72
73 bool _update_braket() {
74 if (_bonds.size() == 0) return false;
75
76 if (this->_bonds[0].type() != bondType::BD_REG) {
77 // check:
78 for (unsigned int i = 0; i < this->_bonds.size(); i++) {
79 if (i < this->_rowrank) {
80 if (this->_bonds[i].type() != bondType::BD_KET) return false;
81 } else {
82 if (this->_bonds[i].type() != bondType::BD_BRA) return false;
83 }
84 }
85 return true;
86 } else {
87 return false;
88 }
89 }
90
91 friend class UniTensor; // allow wrapper to access the private elems
92 friend class DenseUniTensor;
93 // friend class SparseUniTensor;
94 friend class BlockUniTensor;
95 friend class BlockFermionicUniTensor;
96
97 UniTensor_base()
98 : _is_tag(false),
99 _name(std::string("")),
100 _is_braket_form(false),
101 _rowrank(0),
102 _is_diag(false),
103 uten_type_id(UTenType.Void){};
104
105 // copy&assignment constr., use intrusive_ptr's !!
106 UniTensor_base(const UniTensor_base &rhs);
107 UniTensor_base &operator=(UniTensor_base &rhs);
108
109 cytnx_uint64 rowrank() const { return this->_rowrank; }
110 bool is_diag() const { return this->_is_diag; }
111 const bool &is_braket_form() const { return this->_is_braket_form; }
112 const bool &is_tag() const { return this->_is_tag; }
113 const std::vector<std::string> &labels() const { return this->_labels; }
120 cytnx_int64 get_index(std::string label) const {
121 std::vector<std::string> labels = this->_labels;
122 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
123 if (labels[i] == label) return i;
124 }
125 return -1;
126 }
127 const std::vector<Bond> &bonds() const { return this->_bonds; }
128 std::vector<Bond> &bonds() { return this->_bonds; }
129
130 Bond &bond_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx) {
131 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_bonds.size(), "[ERROR][bond] index %d out of bound, total %d\n",
132 idx, this->_bonds.size());
133 return this->_bonds[idx];
134 }
135
136 Bond &bond_(const std::string &label) {
137 auto res = std::find(this->_labels.begin(), this->_labels.end(), label);
138 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_labels.end(), "[ERROR] label %s not exists.\n", label.c_str());
139 cytnx_uint64 idx = std::distance(this->_labels.begin(), res);
140
141 return this->bond_(idx);
142 }
143
144 const std::string &name() const { return this->_name; }
145 cytnx_uint64 rank() const { return this->_labels.size(); }
146 void set_name(const std::string &in) { this->_name = in; }
147
159 void set_label(const std::string &oldlabel, const std::string &new_label) {
160 cytnx_int64 idx;
161 auto res = std::find(this->_labels.begin(), this->_labels.end(), oldlabel);
162 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_labels.end(), "[ERROR] label %s not exists.\n",
163 oldlabel.c_str());
164 idx = std::distance(this->_labels.begin(), res);
165
166 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_labels.size(), "[ERROR] index exceed the rank of UniTensor%s",
167 "\n");
168 // check in:
169 bool is_dup = false;
170 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_labels.size(); i++) {
171 if (i == idx) continue;
172 if (new_label == this->_labels[i]) {
173 is_dup = true;
174 break;
175 }
176 }
177 cytnx_error_msg(is_dup, "[ERROR] alreay has a label that is the same as the input label%s",
178 "\n");
179 this->_labels[idx] = new_label;
180 }
181 void set_label(const cytnx_int64 &inx, const std::string &new_label) {
182 cytnx_error_msg(inx < 0, "[ERROR] index is negative%s", "\n");
183 cytnx_error_msg(inx >= this->_labels.size(), "[ERROR] index exceed the rank of UniTensor%s",
184 "\n");
185 // check in:
186 bool is_dup = false;
187 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_labels.size(); i++) {
188 if (i == inx) continue;
189 if (new_label == this->_labels[i]) {
190 is_dup = true;
191 break;
192 }
193 }
194 cytnx_error_msg(is_dup, "[ERROR] alreay has a label that is the same as the input label%s",
195 "\n");
196 this->_labels[inx] = new_label;
197 }
198
199 [[deprecated("Please use relabel_(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels) instead.")]] void
200 set_labels(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
201 void relabel_(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels); // implemented
202 [[deprecated("Please use relabel_(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels) instead.")]] void
203 relabels_(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels); // implemented
204 void relabel_(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
205 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels); // implemented
206 [[deprecated(
207 "Please use relabel_(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels, const "
208 "std::vector<std::string> &new_labels) instead.")]] void
209 relabels_(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
210 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels); // implemented
211 void relabel_(const std::string &old_label, const std::string &new_label) {
212 this->set_label(old_label, new_label);
213 }
214 void relabel_(const cytnx_int64 &inx, const std::string &new_label) {
215 this->set_label(inx, new_label);
216 }
217
218 int uten_type() { return this->uten_type_id; }
219 std::string uten_type_str() const { return UTenType.getname(this->uten_type_id); }
220

452
453 //======================================================================
455 class DenseUniTensor : public UniTensor_base {
456 protected:
457 public:
458 Tensor _block;
459 std::vector<Tensor> _interface_block; // this is serves as interface for get_blocks_();
460 DenseUniTensor *clone_meta() const {
461 DenseUniTensor *tmp = new DenseUniTensor();
462 tmp->_bonds = vec_clone(this->_bonds);
463 tmp->_labels = this->_labels;
464 tmp->_is_braket_form = this->_is_braket_form;
465 tmp->_rowrank = this->_rowrank;
466 tmp->_is_diag = this->_is_diag;
467 tmp->_name = this->_name;
468 tmp->_is_tag = this->_is_tag;
469 return tmp;
470 }
471 //------------------------------------------
472
473 DenseUniTensor() { this->uten_type_id = UTenType.Dense; };
474 friend class UniTensor; // allow wrapper to access the private elems
475 // virtual functions
476
477 // void Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &in_labels = {},
478 // const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
479 // const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
480 // const bool &no_alloc = false);
481
482 void Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
483 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
484 const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
485 const bool &no_alloc = false, const std::string &name = "");
486 // this only work for non-symm tensor
487 void Init_by_Tensor(const Tensor &in_tensor, const bool &is_diag = false,
488 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const std::string &name = "");
489 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> shape() const {
490 if (this->_is_diag) {
491 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> shape = this->_block.shape();
492 shape.push_back(shape[0]);
493 return shape;
494 } else {
495 return this->_block.shape();
496 }
497 }
498 bool is_blockform() const { return false; }
499 void to_(const int &device) { this->_block.to_(device); }
500 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> to(const int &device) {
501 if (this->device() == device) {
502 std::vector<Tensor> _interface_block; // this is serves as interface for get_blocks_();
503 return this;
504 } else {
505 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
506 out->to_(device);
507 return out;
508 }
509 }
510 void set_rowrank_(const cytnx_uint64 &new_rowrank) {
511 cytnx_error_msg(new_rowrank > this->_labels.size(),
512 "[ERROR] rowrank cannot exceed the rank of UniTensor.%s", "\n");
513 if (this->is_diag()) {
514 cytnx_error_msg(new_rowrank != 1, "[ERROR] rowrank should be [==1] when is_diag =true!.%s",
515 "\n");
516 }
517
518 this->_rowrank = new_rowrank;
519 }
520
521 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> set_rowrank(const cytnx_uint64 &new_rowrank) const {
522 DenseUniTensor *out_raw = this->clone_meta();
523 out_raw->_block = this->_block;
524 out_raw->set_rowrank_(new_rowrank);
525 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(out_raw);
526 return out;
527 }
528
529 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> clone() const {
530 DenseUniTensor *tmp = this->clone_meta();
531 tmp->_block = this->_block.clone();
532 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(tmp);
533 return out;
534 };
535 bool is_contiguous() const { return this->_block.is_contiguous(); }
536 unsigned int dtype() const { return this->_block.dtype(); }
537 int device() const { return this->_block.device(); }
538 std::string dtype_str() const { return Type.getname(this->_block.dtype()); }
539 std::string device_str() const { return Device.getname(this->_block.device()); }
549 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper,
550 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
551 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper,
552 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
553
562 void permute_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
563 void permute_(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
564
565 void twist_(const cytnx_int64 &idx) override {
566 // do nothing for bosonic UniTensor
567 return;
568 }
569 void twist_(const std::string &label) override {
570 // do nothing for bosonic UniTensor
571 return;
572 }
573
574 void fermion_twists_() override {
575 // do nothing for bosonic UniTensor
576 return;
577 }
578
579 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
580 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabels(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
581
582 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
583 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
584 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabels(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
585 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
586
597 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::string &old_label,
598 const std::string &new_label);
599 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const cytnx_int64 &inx,
600 const std::string &new_label);
601
602 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> astype(const unsigned int &dtype) const {
603 DenseUniTensor *tmp = this->clone_meta();
604 tmp->_block = this->_block.astype(dtype);
605 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(tmp);
606 return tmp;
607 }
608
609 std::vector<Symmetry> syms() const {
610 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] dense unitensor does not have symmetry.%s",
611 "\n");
612 return std::vector<Symmetry>();
613 }
614
615 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contiguous_() {
616 this->_block.contiguous_();
617 return boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(this);
618 }
619 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contiguous() {
620 // if contiguous then return self!
621 if (this->is_contiguous()) {
622 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(this);
623 return out;
624 } else {
625 DenseUniTensor *tmp = this->clone_meta();
626 tmp->_block = this->_block.contiguous();
627 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(tmp);
628 return out;
629 }
630 }
631
632 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> apply_() {
633 return boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(this);
634 }
635 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> apply() {
636 // just return self
637 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(this);
638 return out;
639 }
640
641 void print_diagram(const bool &bond_info = false) const;
642 void print_blocks(const bool &full_info = true) const;
643 void print_block(const cytnx_int64 &idx, const bool &full_info = true) const;
644 Tensor get_block() const { return this->_block.clone(); }
645 Tensor get_block(const cytnx_uint64 &idx) const {
646 cytnx_error_msg(idx != 0,
647 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Dense tensor has only one block, block number %llu "
648 "invalid. Use get_block(0).\n",
649 (unsigned long long)idx);
650 return this->_block.clone();
651 }
652
653 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qnum, const bool &force) const {
654 cytnx_error_msg(
655 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] try to get_block() using qnum on a non-symmetry UniTensor%s",
656 "\n");
657 return Tensor();
658 }
659 // return a share view of block, this only work for non-symm tensor.
660 const Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qnum, const bool &force) const {
661 cytnx_error_msg(
662 true,
663 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] try to get_block_() using qnum on a non-symmetry UniTensor%s",
664 "\n");
665 return this->_block;
666 }
667 Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qnum, const bool &force) {
668 cytnx_error_msg(
669 true,
670 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] try to get_block_() using qnum on a non-symmetry UniTensor%s",
671 "\n");
672 return this->_block;
673 }
674
675 // return a share view of block, this only work for non-symm tensor.
676 Tensor &get_block_() { return this->_block; }
677 Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx) {
678 cytnx_error_msg(idx != 0,
679 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Dense tensor has only one block, block number %llu "
680 "invalid. Use get_block_(0).\n",
681 (unsigned long long)idx);
682 return this->_block;
683 }
684 // return a share view of block, this only work for non-symm tensor.
685 const Tensor &get_block_() const { return this->_block; }
686 const Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx) const {
687 cytnx_error_msg(idx != 0,
688 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Dense tensor has only one block, block number %llu "
689 "invalid. Use get_block_(0).\n",
690 (unsigned long long)idx);
691 return this->_block;
692 }
693
694 cytnx_uint64 Nblocks() const { return 1; };
695 std::vector<Tensor> get_blocks() const {
696 std::vector<Tensor> out;
697 cytnx_error_msg(
698 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Cannot use get_blocks(), use get_block() instead!%s", "\n");
699 return out; // this will not share memory!!
700 }
701 const std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &silent = false) const {
702 cytnx_error_msg(
703 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Cannot use get_blocks_(), use get_block_() instead!%s",
704 "\n");
705 return this->_interface_block; // this will not share memory!!
706 }
707 std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &silent = false) {
708 cytnx_error_msg(
709 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Cannot use get_blocks_(), use get_block_() instead!%s",
710 "\n");
711 return this->_interface_block; // this will not share memory!!
712 }
713
714 void put_block(const Tensor &in) {
715 // We don't check the dtype for DenseUniTensor, since it'll be more convenient to change
716 // DenseUniTensor's dtype
717
718 // cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
719 // "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not
720 // match.%s",
721 // "\n");
722 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
723 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
724 "match.%s",
725 "\n");
726 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
727 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
728 if (this->is_diag()) {
729 cytnx_error_msg(
730 in.shape() != this->_block.shape(),
731 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] the input tensor shape does not match.%s", "\n");
732 this->_block = in.clone();
733 } else {
734 cytnx_error_msg(
735 in.shape() != this->shape(),
736 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] the input tensor shape does not match.%s", "\n");
737 this->_block = in.clone();
738 }
739 }
740 void put_block(const Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx) {
741 cytnx_error_msg(idx != 0,
742 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Dense tensor has only one block, block number %llu "
743 "invalid. Use put_block(0).\n",
744 (unsigned long long)idx);
745 put_block(in);
746 }
747 // share view of the block
748 void put_block_(Tensor &in) {
749 // We don't check the dtype for DenseUniTensor, since it'll be more convenient to change
750 // DenseUniTensor's dtype
751
752 // cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
753 // "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not
754 // match.%s",
755 // "\n");
756 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
757 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
758 "match.%s",
759 "\n");
760 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
761 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
762 if (this->is_diag()) {
763 cytnx_error_msg(
764 in.shape() != this->_block.shape(),
765 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] the input tensor shape does not match.%s", "\n");
766 this->_block = in;
767 } else {
768 cytnx_error_msg(
769 in.shape() != this->shape(),
770 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] the input tensor shape does not match.%s", "\n");
771 this->_block = in;
772 }
773 }
774 void put_block_(Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx) {
775 cytnx_error_msg(idx != 0,
776 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Dense tensor has only one block, block number %llu "
777 "invalid. Use put_block_(0).\n",
778 (unsigned long long)idx);
779 put_block_(in);
780 }
781
782 void put_block(const Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qnum, const bool &force) {
783 cytnx_error_msg(
784 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] try to put_block using qnum on a non-symmetry UniTensor%s",
785 "\n");
786 }
787 void put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qnum, const bool &force) {
788 cytnx_error_msg(
789 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] try to put_block using qnum on a non-symmetry UniTensor%s",
790 "\n");
791 }
792 // these two methods only work on non-symm tensor (DenseUniTensor)
793 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> get(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors);
794 void set(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors, const Tensor &rhs);
795
796 void reshape_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape, const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0);
797 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> reshape(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape,
798 const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0);
799 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> to_dense();
800 void to_dense_();
801 void combineBond(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = true);
802 void combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force,
803 const bool &by_label);
804 void combineBonds(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = true);
805 void combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force = true);
806 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contract(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs,
807 const bool &mv_elem_self = false,
808 const bool &mv_elem_rhs = false);
809 std::vector<Bond> getTotalQnums(const bool &physical = false) {
810 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] %s",
811 "getTotalQnums can only operate on UniTensor with symmetry.\n");
812 return std::vector<Bond>();
813 }
814
815 std::vector<std::vector<cytnx_int64>> get_blocks_qnums() const {
816 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] %s",
817 "get_blocks_qnums can only operate on UniTensor with symmetry.\n");
818 return std::vector<std::vector<cytnx_int64>>();
819 }
820
821 bool same_data(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs) const {
822 if (rhs->uten_type() != UTenType.Dense) return false;
823
824 return this->get_block_().same_data(rhs->get_block_());
825 }
826
827 ~DenseUniTensor(){};
828
829 // arithmetic
830 void Add_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
831 void Add_(const Scalar &rhs);
832
833 void Mul_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
834 void Mul_(const Scalar &rhs);
835
836 void Sub_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
837 void Sub_(const Scalar &rhs);
838 void lSub_(const Scalar &lhs);
839
840 void Div_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
841 void Div_(const Scalar &rhs);
842 void lDiv_(const Scalar &lhs);
843
844 void Conj_() { this->_block.Conj_(); };
845
846 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Conj() {
847 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
848 out->Conj_();
849 return out;
850 }
851
852 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Transpose() {
853 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
854 out->Transpose_();
855 return out;
856 }
857 void Transpose_();
858
859 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> normalize() {
860 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
861 out->normalize_();
862 return out;
863 }
864 void normalize_();
865
866 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Dagger() {
867 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->Conj();
868 out->Transpose_();
869 return out;
870 }
871 void Dagger_() {
872 this->Conj_();
873 this->Transpose_();
874 }
884 void Trace_(const cytnx_int64 &a, const cytnx_int64 &b);
885 void Trace_(const std::string &a, const std::string &b);
886 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Trace(const std::string &a, const std::string &b) {
887 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
888 out->Trace_(a, b);
889 return out;
890 }
891 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Trace(const cytnx_int64 &a, const cytnx_int64 &b) {
892 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
893 out->Trace_(a, b);
894 return out;
895 }
896
897 Tensor Norm() const;
898
899 const Scalar::Sproxy at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const {
900 cytnx_error_msg(
901 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
902 "\n");
903 return Scalar::Sproxy();
904 }
905 const cytnx_complex128 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
906 const cytnx_complex128 &aux) const {
907 cytnx_error_msg(
908 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
909 "\n");
910 return cytnx_complex128(0, 0);
911 }
912 const cytnx_complex64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
913 const cytnx_complex64 &aux) const {
914 cytnx_error_msg(
915 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
916 "\n");
917 return cytnx_complex64(0, 0);
918 }
919 const cytnx_double &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
920 const cytnx_double &aux) const {
921 cytnx_error_msg(
922 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
923 "\n");
924 return 0;
925 }

927 const cytnx_float &aux) const {
928 cytnx_error_msg(
929 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
930 "\n");
931 return 0;
932 }

934 const cytnx_uint64 &aux) const {
935 cytnx_error_msg(
936 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
937 "\n");
938 return 0;
939 }
940 const cytnx_int64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
941 const cytnx_int64 &aux) const {
942 cytnx_error_msg(
943 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
944 "\n");
945 return 0;
946 }
947 const cytnx_uint32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
948 const cytnx_uint32 &aux) const {
949 cytnx_error_msg(
950 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
951 "\n");
952 return 0;
953 }
954 const cytnx_int32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
955 const cytnx_int32 &aux) const {
956 cytnx_error_msg(
957 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
958 "\n");
959 return 0;
960 }
961 const cytnx_uint16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
962 const cytnx_uint16 &aux) const {
963 cytnx_error_msg(
964 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
965 "\n");
966 return 0;
967 }
968 const cytnx_int16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
969 const cytnx_int16 &aux) const {
970 cytnx_error_msg(
971 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
972 "\n");
973 return 0;
974 }
975
976 Scalar::Sproxy at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) {
977 cytnx_error_msg(
978 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
979 "\n");
980 return Scalar::Sproxy();
981 }
982 cytnx_complex128 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
983 const cytnx_complex128 &aux) {
984 cytnx_error_msg(
985 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
986 "\n");
987 return *(cytnx_complex128 *)nullptr;
988 }

990 const cytnx_complex64 &aux) {
991 cytnx_error_msg(
992 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
993 "\n");

995 }

997 cytnx_error_msg(
998 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
999 "\n");
1000 return *(cytnx_double *)nullptr;
1001 }
1002 cytnx_float &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_float &aux) {
1003 cytnx_error_msg(
1004 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1005 "\n");
1006 return *(cytnx_float *)nullptr;
1007 }
1008 cytnx_uint64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint64 &aux) {
1009 cytnx_error_msg(
1010 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1011 "\n");
1012 return *(cytnx_uint64 *)nullptr;
1013 }
1014 cytnx_int64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int64 &aux) {
1015 cytnx_error_msg(
1016 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1017 "\n");
1018 return *(cytnx_int64 *)nullptr;
1019 }
1020 cytnx_uint32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint32 &aux) {
1021 cytnx_error_msg(
1022 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1023 "\n");
1024 return *(cytnx_uint32 *)nullptr;
1025 }
1026 cytnx_int32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int32 &aux) {
1027 cytnx_error_msg(
1028 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1029 "\n");
1030 return *(cytnx_int32 *)nullptr;
1031 }
1032 cytnx_uint16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint16 &aux) {
1033 cytnx_error_msg(
1034 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1035 "\n");
1036 return *(cytnx_uint16 *)nullptr;
1037 }
1038 cytnx_int16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int16 &aux) {
1039 cytnx_error_msg(
1040 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1041 "\n");
1042 return *(cytnx_int16 *)nullptr;
1043 }
1044
1045 bool elem_exists(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const {
1046 cytnx_error_msg(
1047 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] elem_exists can only be used on UniTensor with Symmetry.%s",
1048 "\n");
1049 }
1050 void tag() {
1051 if (!this->is_tag()) {
1052 for (int i = 0; i < this->_rowrank; i++) {
1053 this->_bonds[i].set_type(BD_KET);
1054 }
1055 for (int i = this->_rowrank; i < this->_bonds.size(); i++) {
1056 this->_bonds[i].set_type(BD_BRA);
1057 }
1058 this->_is_tag = true;
1059 this->_is_braket_form = this->_update_braket();
1060 }
1061 }
1071 void truncate_(const cytnx_int64 &bond_idx, const cytnx_uint64 &dim);
1072 void truncate_(const std::string &label, const cytnx_uint64 &dim);
1073
1074 void from_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs, const bool &force);
1075
1076 void group_basis_() {
1077 cytnx_warning_msg(true, "[WARNING] group basis will not have any effect on DensUniTensor.%s",
1078 "\n");
1079 }
1080
1081 void _save_dispatch(std::fstream &f) const;
1082 void _load_dispatch(std::fstream &f);
1083
1084 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &get_qindices(const cytnx_uint64 &bidx) const {
1085 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] get_qindices can only be unsed on UniTensor with Symmetry.%s",
1086 "\n");
1087 }
1088 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &get_qindices(const cytnx_uint64 &bidx) {
1089 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] get_qindices can only be unsed on UniTensor with Symmetry.%s",
1090 "\n");
1091 }
1092
1093 const vec2d<cytnx_uint64> &get_itoi() const {
1094 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] get_itoi can only be unsed on UniTensor with Symmetry.%s",
1095 "\n");
1096 }
1097 vec2d<cytnx_uint64> &get_itoi() {
1098 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] get_itoi can only be unsed on UniTensor with Symmetry.%s",
1099 "\n");
1100 }
1101
1102 // end virtual function
1103 };
1105
1106 //======================================================================
1108 class BlockUniTensor : public UniTensor_base {
1109 protected:
1110 public:
1111 std::vector<std::vector<cytnx_uint64>>
1112 _inner_to_outer_idx; // stores the qindices for each block
1113 std::vector<Tensor> _blocks;
1114 Tensor NullRefTensor; // this returns when access block does not exists!
1115
1116 // given an index list [loc], get qnums from this->_bonds[loc] and return the combined qnums
1117 // calculated from Symm object! this assume 1. symmetry are the same for each bond!
1118 // 2. total_qns are feeded with size len(symmetry)
1119 void _fx_get_total_fluxs(std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &loc, const std::vector<Symmetry> &syms,
1120 std::vector<cytnx_int64> &total_qns) {
1121 memset(&total_qns[0], 0, sizeof(cytnx_int64) * total_qns.size());
1122
1123 for (cytnx_int32 i = 0; i < syms.size(); i++) {
1124 if (this->_bonds[0].type() == BD_BRA)
1125 total_qns[i] = syms[i].reverse_rule(this->_bonds[0]._impl->_qnums[loc[0]][i]);
1126 else
1127 total_qns[i] = this->_bonds[0]._impl->_qnums[loc[0]][i];
1128
1129 for (auto j = 1; j < loc.size(); j++) {
1130 if (this->_bonds[j].type() == BD_BRA)
1131 total_qns[i] = syms[i].combine_rule(
1132 total_qns[i], syms[i].reverse_rule(this->_bonds[j]._impl->_qnums[loc[j]][i]));
1133 else {
1134 total_qns[i] =
1135 syms[i].combine_rule(total_qns[i], this->_bonds[j]._impl->_qnums[loc[j]][i]);
1136 }
1137 }
1138 }
1139 }
1140
1141 void _fx_locate_elem(cytnx_int64 &bidx, std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &loc_in_T,
1142 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const;
1143
1144 // internal function, grouping all duplicate qnums in all bonds
1145 void _fx_group_duplicates(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &dup_bond_idxs,
1146 const std::vector<std::vector<cytnx_uint64>> &idx_mappers);
1147
1148 void set_meta(BlockUniTensor *tmp, const bool &inner, const bool &outer) const {
1149 // outer meta
1150 if (outer) {
1151 tmp->_bonds = vec_clone(this->_bonds);
1152 tmp->_labels = this->_labels;
1153 tmp->_is_braket_form = this->_is_braket_form;
1154 tmp->_rowrank = this->_rowrank;
1155 tmp->_name = this->_name;
1156 }
1157
1158 tmp->_is_diag = this->_is_diag;
1159
1160 // inner meta
1161 if (inner) {
1162 tmp->_inner_to_outer_idx = this->_inner_to_outer_idx;
1163 }
1164 }
1165
1166 BlockUniTensor *clone_meta(const bool &inner, const bool &outer) const {
1167 BlockUniTensor *tmp = new BlockUniTensor();
1168 this->set_meta(tmp, inner, outer);
1169 return tmp;
1170 };
1171
1172 friend class UniTensor;
1173 BlockUniTensor() {
1174 this->uten_type_id = UTenType.Block;
1175 this->_is_tag = true;
1176 }
1177
1178 // virtual functions:
1179 // void Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &in_labels = {},
1180 // const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
1181 // const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
1182 // const bool &no_alloc = false);
1183
1184 void Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
1185 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
1186 const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
1187 const bool &no_alloc = false, const std::string &name = "");
1188
1189 void Init_by_Tensor(const Tensor &in_tensor, const bool &is_diag = false,
1190 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const std::string &name = "") {
1191 cytnx_error_msg(
1192 true, "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] Cannot use Init_by_tensor() on a BlockUniTensor.%s", "\n");
1193 }
1194
1195 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> shape() const {
1196 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> out(this->_bonds.size());
1197 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < out.size(); i++) {
1198 out[i] = this->_bonds[i].dim();
1199 }
1200 return out;
1201 }
1202
1203 bool is_blockform() const { return true; }
1204 bool is_contiguous() const {
1205 bool out = true;
1206 for (int i = 0; i < this->_blocks.size(); i++) {
1207 out &= this->_blocks[i].is_contiguous();
1208 }
1209 return out;
1210 };
1211
1212 cytnx_uint64 Nblocks() const { return this->_blocks.size(); };
1213
1214 void to_(const int &device) {
1215 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_blocks.size(); i++) {
1216 this->_blocks[i].to_(device);
1217 }
1218 };
1219
1220 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> to(const int &device) {
1221 if (this->device() == device) {
1222 return this;
1223 } else {
1224 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1225 out->to_(device);
1226 return out;
1227 }
1228 };
1229
1230 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> clone() const {
1231 BlockUniTensor *tmp = this->clone_meta(true, true);
1232 tmp->_blocks = vec_clone(this->_blocks);
1233 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(tmp);
1234 return out;
1235 };
1236
1237 unsigned int dtype() const {
1238 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1239 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
1240 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
1241 "\n");
1242 #endif
1243 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? Type.Void : this->_blocks[0].dtype();
1244 };
1245 int device() const {
1246 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1247 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
1248 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
1249 "\n");
1250 #endif
1251 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? -404 : this->_blocks[0].device();
1252 };
1253 std::string dtype_str() const {
1254 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1255 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
1256 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
1257 "\n");
1258 #endif
1259 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? "Void, no valid blocks" : this->_blocks[0].dtype_str();
1260 };
1261 std::string device_str() const {
1262 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1263 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
1264 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
1265 "\n");
1266 #endif
1267 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? "None, no valid blocks" : this->_blocks[0].device_str();
1268 };
1269
1270 Tensor get_block(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) const {
1271 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(), "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] index out of range%s",
1272 "\n");
1273 return this->_blocks[idx].clone();
1274 };
1275
1276 // this one for Block will return the indicies!!
1277 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices, const bool &force_return) const {
1278 cytnx_error_msg(indices.size() != this->rank(),
1279 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
1280 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
1281 "\n");
1282
1283 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
1284
1285 // find if the indices specify exists!
1286 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
1287 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
1288 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
1289 b = i;
1290 break;
1291 }
1292 }
1293
1294 if (b < 0) {
1295 if (force_return) {
1296 return NullRefTensor;
1297 } else {
1298 cytnx_error_msg(true,
1299 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
1300 "force_return=false, so "
1301 "error throws. \n If you want to return an empty block without "
1302 "error when block is "
1303 "not avaliable, set force_return=True.%s",
1304 "\n");
1305 }
1306 } else {
1307 return this->_blocks[b].clone();
1308 }
1309 }
1310
1311 const Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) const {
1312 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(), "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] index out of range%s",
1313 "\n");
1314 return this->_blocks[idx];
1315 };
1316
1317 Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
1318 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(), "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] index out of range%s",
1319 "\n");
1320 return this->_blocks[idx];
1321 };
1322
1323 const Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices,
1324 const bool &force_return) const {
1325 cytnx_error_msg(indices.size() != this->rank(),
1326 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
1327 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
1328 "\n");
1329
1330 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
1331
1332 // find if the indices specify exists!
1333 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
1334 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
1335 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
1336 b = i;
1337 break;
1338 }
1339 }
1340
1341 if (b < 0) {
1342 if (force_return) {
1343 return this->NullRefTensor;
1344 } else {
1345 cytnx_error_msg(true,
1346 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
1347 "force_return=false, so "
1348 "error throws. \n If you want to return an empty block without "
1349 "error when block is "
1350 "not avaliable, set force_return=True.%s",
1351 "\n");
1352 }
1353 } else {
1354 return this->_blocks[b];
1355 }
1356 }
1357
1358 Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices, const bool &force_return) {
1359 cytnx_error_msg(indices.size() != this->rank(),
1360 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
1361 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
1362 "\n");
1363
1364 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
1365
1366 // find if the indices specify exists!
1367 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
1368 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
1369 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
1370 b = i;
1371 break;
1372 }
1373 }
1374
1375 if (b < 0) {
1376 if (force_return) {
1377 return this->NullRefTensor;
1378 } else {
1379 cytnx_error_msg(true,
1380 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
1381 "force_return=false, so "
1382 "error throws. \n If you want to return an empty block without "
1383 "error when block is "
1384 "not avaliable, set force_return=True.%s",
1385 "\n");
1386 }
1387 } else {
1388 return this->_blocks[b];
1389 }
1390 }
1391
1392 std::vector<Tensor> get_blocks() const { return vec_clone(this->_blocks); }
1393 const std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &) const { return this->_blocks; }
1394 std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &) { return this->_blocks; }
1395
1396 bool same_data(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs) const {
1397 if (rhs->uten_type() != UTenType.Block) return false;
1398 if (rhs->get_blocks_(1).size() != this->get_blocks_(1).size()) return false;
1399
1400 for (int i = 0; i < rhs->get_blocks_(1).size(); i++)
1401 if (this->get_blocks_(1)[i].same_data(rhs->get_blocks_(1)[i]) == false) return false;
1402
1403 return true;
1404 }
1405
1406 void set_rowrank_(const cytnx_uint64 &new_rowrank) {
1407 cytnx_error_msg(new_rowrank > this->rank(),
1408 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] rowrank should be [>=0] and [<=UniTensor.rank].%s",
1409 "\n");
1410 if (this->is_diag()) {
1411 cytnx_error_msg(new_rowrank != 1,
1412 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] rowrank should be [==1] when is_diag =true!.%s",
1413 "\n");
1414 }
1415 this->_rowrank = new_rowrank;
1416 this->_is_braket_form = this->_update_braket();
1417 }
1418
1419 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> set_rowrank(const cytnx_uint64 &new_rowrank) const {
1420 BlockUniTensor *tmp = this->clone_meta(true, true);
1421 tmp->_blocks = this->_blocks;
1422 tmp->set_rowrank_(new_rowrank);
1423 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(tmp);
1424 return out;
1425 }
1426
1427 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper,
1428 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
1429 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper,
1430 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
1431
1432 void permute_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
1433 void permute_(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
1434
1435 void twist_(const cytnx_int64 &idx) override {
1436 // do nothing for bosonic UniTensor
1437 return;
1438 }
1439 void fermion_twists_() override {
1440 // do nothing for bosonic UniTensor
1441 return;
1442 }
1443 void twist_(const std::string &label) override {
1444 // do nothing for bosonic UniTensor
1445 return;
1446 }
1447
1448 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contiguous_() {
1449 for (unsigned int b = 0; b < this->_blocks.size(); b++) this->_blocks[b].contiguous_();
1450 return boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(this);
1451 }
1452 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contiguous();
1453
1454 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> apply_() {
1455 return boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(this);
1456 }
1457 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> apply() {
1458 // just return self
1459 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(this);
1460 return out;
1461 }
1462
1463 void print_diagram(const bool &bond_info = false) const;
1464 void print_blocks(const bool &full_info = true) const;
1465 void print_block(const cytnx_int64 &idx, const bool &full_info = true) const;
1466
1467 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contract(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs,
1468 const bool &mv_elem_self = false,
1469 const bool &mv_elem_rhs = false);
1470
1471 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
1472 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabels(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
1473
1474 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
1475 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
1476 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabels(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
1477 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
1478
1479 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::string &old_label,
1480 const std::string &new_label);
1481 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const cytnx_int64 &inx,
1482 const std::string &new_label);
1483
1484 std::vector<Symmetry> syms() const;
1485
1486 void reshape_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape, const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0) {
1487 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] Cannot reshape a UniTensor with symmetry.%s", "\n");
1488 }
1489 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> reshape(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape,
1490 const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0) {
1491 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] Cannot reshape a UniTensor with symmetry.%s", "\n");
1492 return nullptr;
1493 }
1494
1495 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> to_dense();
1496 void to_dense_();
1497
1498 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> astype(const unsigned int &dtype) const {
1499 BlockUniTensor *tmp = this->clone_meta(true, true);
1500 tmp->_blocks.resize(this->_blocks.size());
1501 for (cytnx_int64 blk = 0; blk < this->_blocks.size(); blk++) {
1502 tmp->_blocks[blk] = this->_blocks[blk].astype(dtype);
1503 }
1504 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(tmp);
1505 return out;
1506 };
1507
1508 // this will only work on non-symm tensor (DenseUniTensor)
1509 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> get(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors) {
1510 cytnx_error_msg(
1511 true,
1512 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][get] Cannot use get on a UniTensor with "
1513 "Symmetry.\n suggestion: try get_block/get_block_/get_blocks/get_blocks_ first.%s",
1514 "\n");
1515 return nullptr;
1516 }
1517
1518 // this will only work on non-symm tensor (DenseUniTensor)
1519 void set(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors, const Tensor &rhs) {
1520 cytnx_error_msg(
1521 true,
1522 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][get] Cannot use get on a UniTensor with "
1523 "Symmetry.\n suggestion: try get_block/get_block_/get_blocks/get_blocks_ first.%s",
1524 "\n");
1525 }
1526
1527 void put_block(const Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
1528 cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
1529 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
1530 "\n");
1531 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
1532 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
1533 "match.%s",
1534 "\n");
1535 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
1536 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
1537 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(), "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] index out of range%s",
1538 "\n");
1539 cytnx_error_msg(in.shape() != this->_blocks[idx].shape(),
1540 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
1541 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
1542 idx);
1543
1544 this->_blocks[idx] = in.clone();
1545 }
1546 void put_block_(Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
1547 cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
1548 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
1549 "\n");
1550 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
1551 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
1552 "match.%s",
1553 "\n");
1554 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
1555 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
1556 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(), "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] index out of range%s",
1557 "\n");
1558 cytnx_error_msg(in.shape() != this->_blocks[idx].shape(),
1559 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
1560 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
1561 idx);
1562
1563 this->_blocks[idx] = in;
1564 }
1565 void put_block(const Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices, const bool &check) {
1566 cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
1567 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
1568 "\n");
1569 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
1570 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
1571 "match.%s",
1572 "\n");
1573 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
1574 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
1575 cytnx_error_msg(indices.size() != this->rank(),
1576 "[ERROR][put_block][BlockUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
1577 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
1578 "\n");
1579
1580 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
1581
1582 // find if the indices specify exists!
1583 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
1584 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
1585 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
1586 b = i;
1587 break;
1588 }
1589 }
1590
1591 if (b < 0) {
1592 if (check) {
1593 cytnx_error_msg(true,
1594 "[ERROR][put_block][BlockUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
1595 "check=true, so error throws. \n If you want without error when block "
1596 "is not avaliable, set check=false.%s",
1597 "\n");
1598 }
1599 } else {
1600 cytnx_error_msg(
1601 in.shape() != this->_blocks[b].shape(),
1602 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
1603 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
1604 b);
1605
1606 this->_blocks[b] = in.clone();
1607 }
1608 }
1609 void put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices, const bool &check) {
1610 cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
1611 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
1612 "\n");
1613 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
1614 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
1615 "match.%s",
1616 "\n");
1617 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
1618 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
1619 cytnx_error_msg(indices.size() != this->rank(),
1620 "[ERROR][put_block][BlockUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
1621 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
1622 "\n");
1623
1624 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
1625
1626 // find if the indices specify exists!
1627 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
1628 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
1629 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
1630 b = i;
1631 break;
1632 }
1633 }
1634
1635 if (b < 0) {
1636 if (check) {
1637 cytnx_error_msg(true,
1638 "[ERROR][put_block][BlockUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
1639 "check=true, so error throws. \n If you want without error when block "
1640 "is not avaliable, set check=false.%s",
1641 "\n");
1642 }
1643 } else {
1644 cytnx_error_msg(
1645 in.shape() != this->_blocks[b].shape(),
1646 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
1647 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
1648 b);
1649 this->_blocks[b] = in;
1650 }
1651 }
1652
1653 void tag() {
1654 // no-use!
1655 }
1656
1657 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Conj() {
1658 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1659 out->Conj_();
1660 return out;
1661 }
1662
1663 void Conj_() {
1664 for (int i = 0; i < this->_blocks.size(); i++) {
1665 this->_blocks[i].Conj_();
1666 }
1667 };
1668
1669 void Transpose_();
1670 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Transpose() {
1671 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1672 out->Transpose_();
1673 return out;
1674 }
1675
1676 void normalize_();
1677 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> normalize() {
1678 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1679 out->normalize_();
1680 return out;
1681 }
1682
1683 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Dagger() {
1684 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->Conj();
1685 out->Transpose_();
1686 return out;
1687 }
1688 void Dagger_() {
1689 this->Conj_();
1690 this->Transpose_();
1691 }
1692
1693 void Trace_(const std::string &a, const std::string &b);
1694 void Trace_(const cytnx_int64 &a, const cytnx_int64 &b);
1695
1696 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Trace(const std::string &a, const std::string &b) {
1697 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1698 out->Trace_(a, b);
1699 if (out->rank() == 0) {
1700 DenseUniTensor *tmp = new DenseUniTensor();
1701 tmp->_block = ((BlockUniTensor *)out.get())->_blocks[0];
1702 out = boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(tmp);
1703 }
1704 return out;
1705 }
1706 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Trace(const cytnx_int64 &a, const cytnx_int64 &b) {
1707 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1708 out->Trace_(a, b);
1709 if (out->rank() == 0) {
1710 DenseUniTensor *tmp = new DenseUniTensor();
1711 tmp->_block = ((BlockUniTensor *)out.get())->_blocks[0];
1712 out = boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(tmp);
1713 }
1714 return out;
1715 }
1716
1717 Tensor Norm() const;
1718
1719 bool elem_exists(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const;
1720
1721 const Scalar::Sproxy at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const;
1722 const cytnx_complex128 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1723 const cytnx_complex128 &aux) const;
1724 const cytnx_complex64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1725 const cytnx_complex64 &aux) const;
1726 const cytnx_double &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1727 const cytnx_double &aux) const;
1728 const cytnx_float &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1729 const cytnx_float &aux) const;
1730 const cytnx_uint64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1731 const cytnx_uint64 &aux) const;
1732 const cytnx_int64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1733 const cytnx_int64 &aux) const;
1734 const cytnx_uint32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1735 const cytnx_uint32 &aux) const;
1736 const cytnx_int32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1737 const cytnx_int32 &aux) const;
1738 const cytnx_uint16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1739 const cytnx_uint16 &aux) const;
1740 const cytnx_int16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1741 const cytnx_int16 &aux) const;
1742
1743 Scalar::Sproxy at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator);
1744 cytnx_complex128 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1745 const cytnx_complex128 &aux);
1746 cytnx_complex64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1747 const cytnx_complex64 &aux);
1748 cytnx_double &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_double &aux);
1749 cytnx_float &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_float &aux);
1750 cytnx_uint64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint64 &aux);
1751 cytnx_int64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int64 &aux);
1752 cytnx_uint32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint32 &aux);
1753 cytnx_int32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int32 &aux);
1754 cytnx_uint16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint16 &aux);
1755 cytnx_int16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int16 &aux);
1756
1757 void _save_dispatch(std::fstream &f) const;
1758 void _load_dispatch(std::fstream &f);
1759
1760 // this will remove the [q_index]-th qnum at [bond_idx]-th Bond!
1761 void truncate_(const std::string &label, const cytnx_uint64 &q_index);
1762 void truncate_(const cytnx_int64 &bond_idx, const cytnx_uint64 &q_index);
1763
1764 void Add_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
1765 void Add_(const Scalar &rhs) {
1766 cytnx_error_msg(
1767 true,
1768 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '+' between Scalar and BlockUniTensor.\n %s "
1769 "\n",
1770 "This operation would destroy the block structure. [Suggest] Avoid or use get/put_block(s) "
1771 "to do operation on blocks.");
1772 }
1773
1774 void Mul_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
1775 void Mul_(const Scalar &rhs);
1776
1777 void Sub_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
1778 void Sub_(const Scalar &rhs) {
1779 cytnx_error_msg(
1780 true,
1781 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '-' between Scalar and BlockUniTensor.\n %s "
1782 "\n",
1783 "This operation would destroy the block structure. [Suggest] Avoid or use get/put_block(s) "
1784 "to do operation on blocks.");
1785 }
1786 void lSub_(const Scalar &lhs) {
1787 cytnx_error_msg(
1788 true,
1789 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '-' between Scalar and BlockUniTensor.\n %s "
1790 "\n",
1791 "This operation would destroy the block structure. [Suggest] Avoid or use get/put_block(s) "
1792 "to do operation on blocks.");
1793 }
1794
1795 void Div_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
1796 void Div_(const Scalar &rhs);
1797 void lDiv_(const Scalar &lhs) {
1798 cytnx_error_msg(
1799 true,
1800 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '/' between Scalar and BlockUniTensor.\n %s "
1801 "\n",
1802 "This operation would cause division by zero on non-block elements. [Suggest] Avoid or use "
1803 "get/put_block(s) to do operation on blocks.");
1804 }
1805 void from_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs, const bool &force,
1806 const cytnx_double &tol);
1807
1808 void group_basis_();
1809
1810 void combineBond(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = false);
1811 void combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force = false);
1812 void combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force,
1813 const bool &by_label);
1814 void combineBonds(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = false);
1815
1816 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &get_qindices(const cytnx_uint64 &bidx) const {
1817 cytnx_error_msg(
1818 bidx >= this->Nblocks(),
1819 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] bidx out of bound! only %d blocks in current UTen.\n",
1820 this->Nblocks());
1821 return this->_inner_to_outer_idx[bidx];
1822 }
1823 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &get_qindices(const cytnx_uint64 &bidx) {
1824 cytnx_error_msg(
1825 bidx >= this->Nblocks(),
1826 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] bidx out of bound! only %d blocks in current UTen.\n",
1827 this->Nblocks());
1828 return this->_inner_to_outer_idx[bidx];
1829 }
1830
1831 const vec2d<cytnx_uint64> &get_itoi() const { return this->_inner_to_outer_idx; }
1832 vec2d<cytnx_uint64> &get_itoi() { return this->_inner_to_outer_idx; }
1833 };
1835
1836 //======================================================================
1838 class BlockFermionicUniTensor : public UniTensor_base {
1839 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; additionally sign flips are stored as
1840 //_signflip and taken care of in all the methods
1841 public:
1842 std::vector<std::vector<cytnx_uint64>>
1843 _inner_to_outer_idx; // stores the qindices for each block
1844 std::vector<Tensor> _blocks;
1845 Tensor NullRefTensor; // this returns when accessed block does not exists!
1846 // additional informaiton for fermions:
1847 std::vector<cytnx_bool>
1848 _signflip; // if true, the sign of the corresponding block needs to be flipped
1849
1850 // given an index list [loc], get qnums from this->_bonds[loc] and return the combined qnums
1851 // calculated from Symm object! this assume 1. symmetry are the same for each bond!
1852 // 2. total_qns are feeded with size len(symmetry)
1853 void _fx_get_total_fluxs(std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &loc, const std::vector<Symmetry> &syms,
1854 std::vector<cytnx_int64> &total_qns) {
1855 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1856 memset(&total_qns[0], 0, sizeof(cytnx_int64) * total_qns.size());
1857
1858 for (cytnx_int32 i = 0; i < syms.size(); i++) {
1859 if (this->_bonds[0].type() == BD_BRA)
1860 total_qns[i] = syms[i].reverse_rule(this->_bonds[0]._impl->_qnums[loc[0]][i]);
1861 else
1862 total_qns[i] = this->_bonds[0]._impl->_qnums[loc[0]][i];
1863
1864 for (auto j = 1; j < loc.size(); j++) {
1865 if (this->_bonds[j].type() == BD_BRA)
1866 total_qns[i] = syms[i].combine_rule(
1867 total_qns[i], syms[i].reverse_rule(this->_bonds[j]._impl->_qnums[loc[j]][i]));
1868 else {
1869 total_qns[i] =
1870 syms[i].combine_rule(total_qns[i], this->_bonds[j]._impl->_qnums[loc[j]][i]);
1871 }
1872 }
1873 }
1874 }
1875
1876 void _fx_locate_elem(cytnx_int64 &bidx, std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &loc_in_T,
1877 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const;
1878
1879 // internal function, grouping all duplicate qnums in all bonds
1880 void _fx_group_duplicates(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &dup_bond_idxs,
1881 const std::vector<std::vector<cytnx_uint64>> &idx_mappers);
1882
1883 void set_meta(BlockFermionicUniTensor *tmp, const bool &inner, const bool &outer) const {
1884 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; additionally, _signflip is set
1885 // outer meta
1886 if (outer) {
1887 tmp->_bonds = vec_clone(this->_bonds);
1888 tmp->_labels = this->_labels;
1889 tmp->_is_braket_form = this->_is_braket_form;
1890 tmp->_rowrank = this->_rowrank;
1891 tmp->_name = this->_name;
1892 // tmp->_signflip = vec_clone(this->_signflip);
1893 tmp->_signflip = this->_signflip;
1894 }
1895
1896 tmp->_is_diag = this->_is_diag;
1897
1898 // inner meta
1899 if (inner) {
1900 tmp->_inner_to_outer_idx = this->_inner_to_outer_idx;
1901 }
1902 }
1903
1904 BlockFermionicUniTensor *clone_meta(const bool &inner, const bool &outer) const {
1905 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1906 BlockFermionicUniTensor *tmp = new BlockFermionicUniTensor();
1907 this->set_meta(tmp, inner, outer);
1908 return tmp;
1909 };
1910
1911 friend class UniTensor;
1912 BlockFermionicUniTensor() {
1913 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1914 this->uten_type_id = UTenType.BlockFermionic;
1915 this->_is_tag = true;
1916 }
1917
1918 void Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
1919 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
1920 const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
1921 const bool &no_alloc = false, const std::string &name = "");
1922
1923 void Init_by_Tensor(const Tensor &in_tensor, const bool &is_diag = false,
1924 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const std::string &name = "") {
1925 cytnx_error_msg(true,
1926 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] Cannot use Init_by_tensor() on a "
1927 "BlockFermionicUniTensor.%s",
1928 "\n");
1929 }
1930
1931 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> shape() const {
1932 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1933 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> out(this->_bonds.size());
1934 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < out.size(); i++) {
1935 out[i] = this->_bonds[i].dim();
1936 }
1937 return out;
1938 }
1939
1940 bool is_blockform() const {
1941 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1942 return true;
1943 }
1944
1945 bool is_contiguous() const {
1946 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1947 bool out = true;
1948 for (int i = 0; i < this->_blocks.size(); i++) {
1949 out &= this->_blocks[i].is_contiguous();
1950 }
1951 return out;
1952 };
1953
1954 cytnx_uint64 Nblocks() const {
1955 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1956 return this->_blocks.size();
1957 };
1958
1959 std::vector<bool> signflip() const override { return this->_signflip; };
1960 std::vector<bool> &signflip_() override { return this->_signflip; };
1961
1962 void to_(const int &device) {
1963 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1964 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_blocks.size(); i++) {
1965 this->_blocks[i].to_(device);
1966 }
1967 };
1968
1969 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> to(const int &device) {
1970 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1971 if (this->device() == device) {
1972 return this;
1973 } else {
1974 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1975 out->to_(device);
1976 return out;
1977 }
1978 };
1979
1980 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> clone() const {
1981 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; changed to BlockFermionicUniTensor as
1982 // output
1983 BlockFermionicUniTensor *tmp = this->clone_meta(true, true);
1984 tmp->_blocks = vec_clone(this->_blocks);
1985 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(tmp);
1986 return out;
1987 };
1988
1989 unsigned int dtype() const {
1990 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1991 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
1992 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
1993 "\n");
1994 #endif
1995 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? Type.Void : this->_blocks[0].dtype();
1996 };
1997 int device() const {
1998 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1999 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
2000 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
2001 "\n");
2002 #endif
2003 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? -404 : this->_blocks[0].device();
2004 };
2005 std::string dtype_str() const {
2006 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2007 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
2008 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
2009 "\n");
2010 #endif
2011 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? "Void, no valid blocks" : this->_blocks[0].dtype_str();
2012 };
2013 std::string device_str() const {
2014 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2015 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
2016 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
2017 "\n");
2018 #endif
2019 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? "None, no valid blocks" : this->_blocks[0].device_str();
2020 };
2021
2022 Tensor get_block(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) const {
2023 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2024 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(),
2025 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] index out of range%s", "\n");
2026 return this->_blocks[idx].clone();
2027 };
2028
2029 // this one for Block will return the indicies!!
2030 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices, const bool &force_return) const {
2031 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2032 cytnx_error_msg(
2033 indices.size() != this->rank(),
2034 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
2035 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
2036 "\n");
2037
2038 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
2039
2040 // find if the indices specify exists!
2041 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
2042 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
2043 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
2044 b = i;
2045 break;
2046 }
2047 }
2048
2049 if (b < 0) {
2050 if (force_return) {
2051 return NullRefTensor;
2052 } else {
2053 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2054 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
2055 "force_return=false, so "
2056 "error throws. \n If you want to return an empty block without "
2057 "error when block is "
2058 "not avaliable, set force_return=True.%s",
2059 "\n");
2060 }
2061 } else {
2062 return this->_blocks[b].clone();
2063 }
2064 }
2065
2066 const Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) const {
2067 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2068 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(),
2069 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] index out of range%s", "\n");
2070 return this->_blocks[idx];
2071 };
2072
2073 Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
2074 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2075 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(),
2076 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] index out of range%s", "\n");
2077 return this->_blocks[idx];
2078 };
2079
2080 const Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices,
2081 const bool &force_return) const {
2082 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2083 cytnx_error_msg(
2084 indices.size() != this->rank(),
2085 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
2086 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
2087 "\n");
2088
2089 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
2090
2091 // find if the indices specify exists!
2092 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
2093 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
2094 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
2095 b = i;
2096 break;
2097 }
2098 }
2099
2100 if (b < 0) {
2101 if (force_return) {
2102 return this->NullRefTensor;
2103 } else {
2104 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2105 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
2106 "force_return=false, so "
2107 "error throws. \n If you want to return an empty block without "
2108 "error when block is "
2109 "not avaliable, set force_return=True.%s",
2110 "\n");
2111 }
2112 } else {
2113 return this->_blocks[b];
2114 }
2115 }
2116
2117 Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices, const bool &force_return) {
2118 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2119 cytnx_error_msg(
2120 indices.size() != this->rank(),
2121 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
2122 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
2123 "\n");
2124
2125 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
2126
2127 // find if the indices specify exists!
2128 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
2129 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
2130 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
2131 b = i;
2132 break;
2133 }
2134 }
2135
2136 if (b < 0) {
2137 if (force_return) {
2138 return this->NullRefTensor;
2139 } else {
2140 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2141 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
2142 "force_return=false, so "
2143 "error throws. \n If you want to return an empty block without "
2144 "error when block is "
2145 "not avaliable, set force_return=True.%s",
2146 "\n");
2147 }
2148 } else {
2149 return this->_blocks[b];
2150 }
2151 }
2152
2153 std::vector<Tensor> get_blocks() const {
2154 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2155 return vec_clone(this->_blocks);
2156 }
2157 const std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &) const {
2158 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2159 return this->_blocks;
2160 }
2161 std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &) {
2162 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2163 return this->_blocks;
2164 }
2165
2166 bool same_data(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs) const {
2167 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; changed to BlockFermionic UTenType
2168 if (rhs->uten_type() != UTenType.BlockFermionic) return false;
2169 if (rhs->get_blocks_(1).size() != this->get_blocks_(1).size()) return false;
2170
2171 for (int i = 0; i < rhs->get_blocks_(1).size(); i++)
2172 if (this->get_blocks_(1)[i].same_data(rhs->get_blocks_(1)[i]) == false) return false;
2173
2174 return true;
2175 }
2176
2177 void set_rowrank_(const cytnx_uint64 &new_rowrank) {
2178 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2179 cytnx_error_msg(
2180 new_rowrank > this->rank(),
2181 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] rowrank should be [>=0] and [<=UniTensor.rank].%s", "\n");
2182 if (this->is_diag()) {
2183 cytnx_error_msg(
2184 new_rowrank != 1,
2185 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] rowrank should be [==1] when is_diag =true!.%s", "\n");
2186 }
2187 this->_rowrank = new_rowrank;
2188 this->_is_braket_form = this->_update_braket();
2189 }
2190
2191 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> set_rowrank(const cytnx_uint64 &new_rowrank) const {
2192 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; output type changed to
2193 // BlockFermionicUniTensor
2194 BlockFermionicUniTensor *tmp = this->clone_meta(true, true);
2195 tmp->_blocks = this->_blocks;
2196 tmp->set_rowrank_(new_rowrank);
2197 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(tmp);
2198 return out;
2199 }
2200
2201 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper,
2202 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
2203 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper,
2204 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
2205
2206 void permute_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1) override;
2207 void permute_(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1) override;
2208
2209 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute_nosignflip(
2210 const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1) override;
2211 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute_nosignflip(
2212 const std::vector<std::string> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1) override;
2213 void permute_nosignflip_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper,
2214 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1) override;
2215 void permute_nosignflip_(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper,
2216 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1) override;
2217
2218 void twist_(const cytnx_int64 &idx) override;
2219 void twist_(const std::string &label) override;
2220 void fermion_twists_() override;
2221
2222 // Helper function; implements the sign flips when permuting indices
2223 std::vector<bool> _swapsigns_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper) const;
2224 std::vector<bool> _lhssigns_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper,
2225 const cytnx_int64 contrno) const;
2226 std::vector<bool> _swapsigns_(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &mapper) const;
2227 std::vector<bool> _lhssigns_(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &mapper,
2228 const cytnx_uint64 contrno) const;
2229
2230 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contiguous_() {
2231 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2232 for (unsigned int b = 0; b < this->_blocks.size(); b++) this->_blocks[b].contiguous_();
2233 return boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(this);
2234 }
2235 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contiguous();
2236
2237 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> apply_();

2254 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);

2256 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::string &old_label,
2257 const std::string &new_label);
