2261
2262 void reshape_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape, const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0) {
2263 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] Cannot reshape a UniTensor with symmetry.%s", "\n");
2264 }
2265 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> reshape(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape,
2266 const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0) {
2267 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] Cannot reshape a UniTensor with symmetry.%s", "\n");
2268 return nullptr;
2269 }
2270
2271 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> to_dense();
2272 void to_dense_();
2273
2274 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> astype(const unsigned int &dtype) const {
2275 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; the tensor type was adapted
2276 BlockFermionicUniTensor *tmp = this->clone_meta(true, true);
2277 tmp->_blocks.resize(this->_blocks.size());
2278 for (cytnx_int64 blk = 0; blk < this->_blocks.size(); blk++) {
2279 tmp->_blocks[blk] = this->_blocks[blk].astype(dtype);
2280 }
2281 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(tmp);
2282 return out;
2283 };
2284
2285 // this will only work on non-symm tensor (DenseUniTensor)
2286 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> get(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors) {
2287 cytnx_error_msg(
2288 true,
2289 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][get] Cannot use get on a UniTensor with "
2290 "Symmetry.\n suggestion: try get_block/get_block_/get_blocks/get_blocks_ first.%s",
2291 "\n");
2292 return nullptr;
2293 }
2294
2295 // this will only work on non-symm tensor (DenseUniTensor)
2296 void set(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors, const Tensor &rhs) {
2297 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2298 cytnx_error_msg(
2299 true,
2300 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][get] Cannot use get on a UniTensor with "
2301 "Symmetry.\n suggestion: try get_block/get_block_/get_blocks/get_blocks_ first.%s",
2302 "\n");
2303 }
2304
2305 void put_block(const Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
2306 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2307 cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
2308 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
2309 "\n");
2310 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
2311 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
2312 "match.%s",
2313 "\n");
2314 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
2315 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
2316 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(),
2317 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] index out of range%s", "\n");
2318 cytnx_error_msg(
2319 in.shape() != this->_blocks[idx].shape(),
2320 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
2321 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
2322 idx);
2323
2324 this->_blocks[idx] = in.clone();
2325 }
2326 void put_block_(Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
2327 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2328 cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
2329 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
2330 "\n");
2331 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
2332 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
2333 "match.%s",
2334 "\n");
2335 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
2336 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
2337 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(),
2338 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] index out of range%s", "\n");
2339 cytnx_error_msg(
2340 in.shape() != this->_blocks[idx].shape(),
2341 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
2342 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
2343 idx);
2344
2345 this->_blocks[idx] = in;
2346 }
2347 void put_block(const Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices, const bool &check) {
2348 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2349 cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
2350 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
2351 "\n");
2352 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
2353 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
2354 "match.%s",
2355 "\n");
2356 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
2357 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
2358 cytnx_error_msg(
2359 indices.size() != this->rank(),
2360 "[ERROR][put_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
2361 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
2362 "\n");
2363
2364 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
2365
2366 // find if the indices specify exists!
2367 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
2368 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
2369 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
2370 b = i;
2371 break;
2372 }
2373 }
2374
2375 if (b < 0) {
2376 if (check) {
2377 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2378 "[ERROR][put_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
2379 "check=true, so error throws. \n If you want without error when block "
2380 "is not avaliable, set check=false.%s",
2381 "\n");
2382 }
2383 } else {
2384 cytnx_error_msg(
2385 in.shape() != this->_blocks[b].shape(),
2386 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
2387 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
2388 b);
2389
2390 this->_blocks[b] = in.clone();
2391 }
2392 }
2393 void put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices, const bool &check) {
2394 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2395 cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
2396 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
2397 "\n");
2398 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
2399 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
2400 "match.%s",
2401 "\n");
2402 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
2403 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
2404 cytnx_error_msg(
2405 indices.size() != this->rank(),
2406 "[ERROR][put_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
2407 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
2408 "\n");
2409
2410 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
2411
2412 // find if the indices specify exists!
2413 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
2414 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
2415 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
2416 b = i;
2417 break;
2418 }
2419 }
2420
2421 if (b < 0) {
2422 if (check) {
2423 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2424 "[ERROR][put_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
2425 "check=true, so error throws. \n If you want without error when block "
2426 "is not avaliable, set check=false.%s",
2427 "\n");
2428 }
2429 } else {
2430 cytnx_error_msg(
2431 in.shape() != this->_blocks[b].shape(),
2432 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
2433 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
2434 b);
2435 this->_blocks[b] = in;
2436 }
2437 }
2438
2439 void tag() {
2440 // no-use!
2441 }
2442
2443 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Conj() {
2444 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2445 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
2446 out->Conj_();
2447 return out;
2448 }
2449
2450 void Conj_() {
2451 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2452 for (int i = 0; i < this->_blocks.size(); i++) {
2453 this->_blocks[i].Conj_();
2454 }
2455 };
2456
2457 // Transpose(_) changes the index order without sign flips and reverses the bond directions for
2458 // fermionic tensors
2459 void Transpose_();
2460 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Transpose() {
2461 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2462 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
2463 out->Transpose_();
2464 return out;
2465 }
2466
2467 void normalize_();
2468 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> normalize() {
2469 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2470 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
2471 out->normalize_();
2472 return out;
2473 }
2474
2475 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Dagger() {
2476 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2477 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->Conj();
2478 out->Transpose_();
2479 return out;
2480 }
2481 void Dagger_() {
2482 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2483 this->Conj_();
2484 this->Transpose_();
2485 }
2486
2487 void Trace_(const std::string &a, const std::string &b);
2488 void Trace_(const cytnx_int64 &a, const cytnx_int64 &b);
2489
2490 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Trace(const std::string &a, const std::string &b) {
2491 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; the tensor type was adapted
2492 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
2493 out->Trace_(a, b);
2494 if (out->rank() == 0) {
2495 DenseUniTensor *tmp = new DenseUniTensor();
2496 tmp->_block = ((BlockFermionicUniTensor *)out.get())->_blocks[0];
2497 out = boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(tmp);
2498 }
2499 return out;
2500 }
2501 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Trace(const cytnx_int64 &a, const cytnx_int64 &b) {
2502 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; the tensor type was adapted
2503 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
2504 out->Trace_(a, b);
2505 if (out->rank() == 0) {
2506 DenseUniTensor *tmp = new DenseUniTensor();
2507 tmp->_block = ((BlockFermionicUniTensor *)out.get())->_blocks[0];
2508 out = boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(tmp);
2509 }
2510 return out;
2511 }

2513 Tensor Norm() const;

2517 const Scalar::Sproxy at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const;

2519 const cytnx_complex128 &aux) const;

2521 const cytnx_complex64 &aux) const;
2522 const cytnx_double &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2523 const cytnx_double &aux) const;
2524 const cytnx_float &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2525 const cytnx_float &aux) const;
2526 const cytnx_uint64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2527 const cytnx_uint64 &aux) const;
2528 const cytnx_int64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2529 const cytnx_int64 &aux) const;
2530 const cytnx_uint32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2531 const cytnx_uint32 &aux) const;
2532 const cytnx_int32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2533 const cytnx_int32 &aux) const;

2535 const cytnx_uint16 &aux) const;
2536 const cytnx_int16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2537 const cytnx_int16 &aux) const;

2539 Scalar::Sproxy at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator);

2541 const cytnx_complex128 &aux);
2542 cytnx_complex64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2543 const cytnx_complex64 &aux);
2544 cytnx_double &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_double &aux);
2545 cytnx_float &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_float &aux);
2546 cytnx_uint64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint64 &aux);
2547 cytnx_int64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int64 &aux);
2548 cytnx_uint32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint32 &aux);

2551 cytnx_int16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int16 &aux);
2552
2553 void _save_dispatch(std::fstream &f) const;
2554 void _load_dispatch(std::fstream &f);
2555
2556 // this will remove the [q_index]-th qnum at [bond_idx]-th Bond!
2557 void truncate_(const std::string &label, const cytnx_uint64 &q_index);
2558 void truncate_(const cytnx_int64 &bond_idx, const cytnx_uint64 &q_index);
2559
2560 void Add_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
2561 void Add_(const Scalar &rhs) {
2562 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2563 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '+' between Scalar and "
2564 "BlockFermionicUniTensor.\n %s "
2565 "\n",
2566 "This operation would destroy the block structure. [Suggest] Avoid or use "
2567 "get/put_block(s) to do operation on blocks.");
2568 }
2569
2570 void Mul_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
2571 void Mul_(const Scalar &rhs);
2572
2573 void Sub_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
2574 void Sub_(const Scalar &rhs) {
2575 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2576 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '-' between Scalar and "
2577 "BlockFermionicUniTensor.\n %s "
2578 "\n",
2579 "This operation would destroy the block structure. [Suggest] Avoid or use "
2580 "get/put_block(s) to do operation on blocks.");
2581 }
2582 void lSub_(const Scalar &lhs) {
2583 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2584 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '-' between Scalar and "
2585 "BlockFermionicUniTensor.\n %s "
2586 "\n",
2587 "This operation would destroy the block structure. [Suggest] Avoid or use "
2588 "get/put_block(s) to do operation on blocks.");
2589 }
2590
2591 void Div_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
2592 void Div_(const Scalar &rhs);
2593 void lDiv_(const Scalar &lhs) {
2594 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2595 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '/' between Scalar and "
2596 "BlockFermionicUniTensor.\n %s "
2597 "\n",
2598 "This operation would cause division by zero on non-block elements. "
2599 "[Suggest] Avoid or use get/put_block(s) to do operation on blocks.");
2600 }
2601 void from_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs, const bool &force);
2602
2603 void group_basis_();
2604
2605 void combineBond(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = false);
2606 void combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force = false);
2607 void combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force,
2608 const bool &by_label);
2609 void combineBonds(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = false);
2610
2611 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &get_qindices(const cytnx_uint64 &bidx) const {
2612 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2613 cytnx_error_msg(
2614 bidx >= this->Nblocks(),
2615 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] bidx out of bound! only %d blocks in current UTen.\n",
2616 this->Nblocks());
2617 return this->_inner_to_outer_idx[bidx];
2618 }
2619 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &get_qindices(const cytnx_uint64 &bidx) {
2620 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2621 cytnx_error_msg(
2622 bidx >= this->Nblocks(),
2623 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] bidx out of bound! only %d blocks in current UTen.\n",
2624 this->Nblocks());
2625 return this->_inner_to_outer_idx[bidx];
2626 }
2627
2628 const vec2d<cytnx_uint64> &get_itoi() const {
2629 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2630 return this->_inner_to_outer_idx;
2631 }
2632 vec2d<cytnx_uint64> &get_itoi() {
2633 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2634 return this->_inner_to_outer_idx;
2635 }
2636
2637 void beauty_print_block(std::ostream &os, const cytnx_uint64 &Nin, const cytnx_uint64 &Nout,
2638 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &qn_indices,
2639 const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const Tensor &block) const;
2640 };
2642
2643 //======================================================================
2644
2646 class UniTensor_options {
2647 public:
2648 bool _is_diag;
2649 int _dtype;
2650 int _device;
2651 int _rowrank;
2652
2653 UniTensor_options() {
2654 this->_is_diag = false;
2655 this->_dtype = Type.Double;
2656 this->_device = Device.cpu;
2657 this->_rowrank = -1;
2658 }
2659
2660 UniTensor_options(const UniTensor_options &rhs) {
2661 this->_is_diag = rhs._is_diag;
2662 this->_dtype = rhs._dtype;
2663 this->_device = rhs._device;
2664 this->_rowrank = rhs._rowrank;
2665 }
2666
2667 UniTensor_options &operator=(const UniTensor_options &rhs) {
2668 this->_is_diag = rhs._is_diag;
2669 this->_dtype = rhs._dtype;
2670 this->_device = rhs._device;
2671 this->_rowrank = rhs._rowrank;
2672 return *this;
2673 }
2674
2675 UniTensor_options &is_diag(const bool &in) {
2676 this->_is_diag = in;
2677 return *this;
2678 }
2679 UniTensor_options &dtype(const int &in) {
2680 this->_dtype = in;
2681 return *this;
2682 }
2683 UniTensor_options &device(const int &in) {
2684 this->_device = in;
2685 return *this;
2686 }
2687 UniTensor_options &rowrank(const int &in) {
2688 this->_rowrank = in;
2689 return *this;
2690 }
2691 };
2693
2695 class UniTensor {
2696 public:
2698 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> _impl;
2699 UniTensor() : _impl(new UniTensor_base()){};
2700 UniTensor(const UniTensor &rhs) { this->_impl = rhs._impl; }
2701 UniTensor &operator=(const UniTensor &rhs) {
2702 this->_impl = rhs._impl;
2703 return *this;
2704 }
2706
2708
2734 explicit UniTensor(const Tensor &in_tensor, const bool &is_diag = false,
2735 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1,
2736 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {}, const std::string &name = "")
2737 : _impl(new UniTensor_base()) {
2738 this->Init(in_tensor, is_diag, rowrank, in_labels, name);
2739 }
2757 void Init(const Tensor &in_tensor, const bool &is_diag = false, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1,
2758 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {}, const std::string &name = "") {
2759 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(new DenseUniTensor());
2760 out->Init_by_Tensor(in_tensor, is_diag, rowrank, name);
2761 this->_impl = out;
2762 if (in_labels.size() != 0) this->set_labels(in_labels);
2763 }
2765
2767
2784 UniTensor(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
2785 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
2786 const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
2787 const std::string &name = "")
2788 : _impl(new UniTensor_base()) {
2789 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
2790 cytnx_warning_msg(
2791 true,
2792 "[DEBUG] message: entry for UniTensor(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const "
2793 "std::vector<std::string> &in_labels={}, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank=-1, const unsigned "
2794 "int "
2795 "&dtype=Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag=false)%s",
2796 "\n");
2797 #endif
2798 this->Init(bonds, in_labels, rowrank, dtype, device, is_diag, name);
2799 }
2800
2802 /* [developing]
2803 void Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
2804 const UniTensor_options &UToptions = UniTensor_options(), const std::string &name =
2805 ""){ this->Init(bonds,in_labels, UToptions._rowrank, UToptions._dtype , UToptions._device ,
2806 UToptions._is_diag,
2807 name);
2808 }
2809 */
2811
2835 UniTensor &Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
2836 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
2837 const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
2838 const std::string &name = "") {
2839 // checking type:
2840 bool is_sym = false;
2841 int sym_fver = -1;
2842 bool fermionic = false;
2843
2844 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < bonds.size(); i++) {
2845 // check
2846 if (bonds[i].syms().size() != 0) {
2847 is_sym = true;
2848 if (sym_fver == -1)
2849 sym_fver = bonds[i]._impl->_degs.size();
2850 else {
2851 cytnx_error_msg((bool(sym_fver) ^ bool(bonds[i]._impl->_degs.size())),
2852 "[ERROR] When initializing a UniTensor with symmetries, all Bonds must "
2853 "be in the same format!%s",
2854 "\n");
2855 }
2856 if (!fermionic) {
2857 std::vector<Symmetry> symms = bonds[i].syms();
2858 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < symms.size(); i++) {
2859 if (symms[i].is_fermionic()) fermionic = true;
2860 }
2861 }
2862 } else
2863 cytnx_error_msg(
2864 is_sym, "[ERROR] Cannot have bonds with mixing of symmetry and non-symmetry.%s", "\n");
2865 }
2866
2867 // dynamical dispatch:
2868 if (is_sym) {
2869 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
2870 cytnx_warning_msg(true, "[DEBUG] message: entry dispatch: UniTensor: symmetric%s", "\n");
2871 #endif
2872 // cytnx_warning_msg(true,"[warning, still developing, some functions will display
2873 // \"[Developing]\"][SparseUniTensor]%s","\n");
2874 if (sym_fver == 0) {
2875 // boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(new SparseUniTensor());
2876 // this->_impl = out;
2877 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2878 "[ERROR] internal error! [legacy Sparse entry] the Bond is symmetry but "
2879 "the version is not properly determined!%s",
2880 "\n")
2881 } else if (sym_fver == -1) {
2882 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2883 "[ERROR] internal error! the Bond is symmetry but the version is not "
2884 "properly determined!%s",
2885 "\n");
2886 } else {
2887 if (fermionic) {
2888 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(new BlockFermionicUniTensor());
2889 this->_impl = out;
2890 } else {
2891 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(new BlockUniTensor());
2892 this->_impl = out;
2893 }
2894 }
2895 } else {
2896 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(new DenseUniTensor());
2897 this->_impl = out;
2898 }
2899 this->_impl->Init(bonds, in_labels, rowrank, dtype, device, is_diag, false, name);
2900 return *this;
2901 }
2902

2910 this->_impl->set_name(in);

3003 "Please use "
3004 "UniTensor &relabel_(const std::initializer_list<char *> &new_labels) "
3005 "instead.")]] UniTensor &
3006 set_labels(const std::initializer_list<char *> &new_labels) {
3007 std::vector<char *> new_lbls(new_labels);

3009 transform(new_lbls.begin(), new_lbls.end(), vs.begin(),
3010 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3011
3012 this->_impl->set_labels(vs);
3013 return *this;
3014 }

3033 template <class T>
3034 T &item() {
3035 cytnx_error_msg(this->is_blockform(),
3036 "[ERROR] Cannot use item on UniTensor with Symmetry.\n suggestion: use "
3037 "get_block()/get_blocks() first.%s",
3038 "\n");
3039
3040 DenseUniTensor *tmp = static_cast<DenseUniTensor *>(this->_impl.get());
3041 return tmp->_block.item<T>();
3042 }
3043
3044 Scalar::Sproxy item() const {
3045 cytnx_error_msg(this->is_blockform(),
3046 "[ERROR] Cannot use item on UniTensor with Symmetry.\n suggestion: use "
3047 "get_block()/get_blocks() first.%s",
3048 "\n");
3049
3050 DenseUniTensor *tmp = static_cast<DenseUniTensor *>(this->_impl.get());
3051 return tmp->_block.item();
3052 }

3432 [[deprecated(

3435 "std::vector<std::string> &new_labels) "
3436 "instead.")]] UniTensor &
3437 relabels_(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
3438 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels) {
3439 this->_impl->relabels_(old_labels, new_labels);
3440 return *this;

3442
3447 UniTensor relabel(const std::initializer_list<char *> &old_labels,
3448 const std::initializer_list<char *> &new_labels) const {
3449 std::vector<char *> new_lbls(new_labels);
3450 std::vector<std::string> vs(new_lbls.size());
3451 transform(new_lbls.begin(), new_lbls.end(), vs.begin(),
3452 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3453
3454 std::vector<char *> old_lbls(old_labels);
3455 std::vector<std::string> vs_old(old_lbls.size());
3456 transform(old_lbls.begin(), old_lbls.end(), vs_old.begin(),
3457 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3458
3459 return this->relabel(vs_old, vs);
3460 }
3461
3467 [[deprecated(
3468 "Please use "
3469 "UniTensor relabel(const std::initializer_list<char *> &old_labels, const "
3470 "std::initializer_list<char *> &new_labels) const "
3471 "instead.")]] UniTensor
3472 relabels(const std::initializer_list<char *> &old_labels,
3473 const std::initializer_list<char *> &new_labels) const {
3474 std::vector<char *> new_lbls(new_labels);
3475 std::vector<std::string> vs(new_lbls.size());
3476 transform(new_lbls.begin(), new_lbls.end(), vs.begin(),
3477 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3478
3479 std::vector<char *> old_lbls(old_labels);
3480 std::vector<std::string> vs_old(old_lbls.size());
3481 transform(old_lbls.begin(), old_lbls.end(), vs_old.begin(),
3482 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3483
3484 return this->relabels(vs_old, vs);
3485 }
3486
3491 UniTensor &relabel_(const std::initializer_list<char *> &old_labels,
3492 const std::initializer_list<char *> &new_labels) {
3493 std::vector<char *> new_lbls(new_labels);
3494 std::vector<std::string> vs(new_lbls.size());
3495 transform(new_lbls.begin(), new_lbls.end(), vs.begin(),
3496 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3497
3498 std::vector<char *> old_lbls(old_labels);
3499 std::vector<std::string> vs_old(old_lbls.size());
3500 transform(old_lbls.begin(), old_lbls.end(), vs_old.begin(),
3501 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3502
3503 this->relabel_(vs_old, vs);
3504 return *this;
3505 }

3512 "Please use "
3513 "UniTensor &relabel_(const std::initializer_list<char *> &old_labels, const "

3524 std::vector<std::string> vs_old(old_lbls.size());
3525 transform(old_lbls.begin(), old_lbls.end(), vs_old.begin(),

3527

3603 UniTensor astype(const unsigned int &dtype) const {
3604 UniTensor out;
3605 if (this->dtype() == dtype) {
3606 out._impl = this->_impl;
3607 } else {
3608 out._impl = this->_impl->astype(dtype);
3609 }
3610 return out;
3611 }

3647 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1) const {

3649 std::vector<std::string> vs(mprs.size());
3650 transform(mprs.begin(), mprs.end(), vs.begin(),
3651 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3652
3653 return this->permute(vs, rowrank);
3654 }

3906 this->_impl->print_block(idx, full_info);

3925
3934 template <class T>
3935 T &at(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) {
3936 if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Block || this->uten_type() == UTenType.BlockFermionic) {
3937 // [NEW] this will not check if it exists, if it is not then error will throw!
3938 T aux;
3939 return this->_impl->at_for_sparse(locator, aux);
3940
3941 } else if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Sparse) {
3942 if (this->_impl->elem_exists(locator)) {
3943 T aux;
3944 return this->_impl->at_for_sparse(locator, aux);
3945 } else {
3946 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR][SparseUniTensor] invalid location. break qnum block.%s",
3947 "\n");
3948 }
3949 } else {
3950 return this->get_block_().at<T>(locator);
3951 }
3952 }
3953
3962 template <class T>
3963 const T &at(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const {
3964 if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Block || this->uten_type() == UTenType.BlockFermionic) {
3965 // [NEW] this will not check if it exists, if it is not then error will throw!
3966 T aux;
3967 return this->_impl->at_for_sparse(locator, aux);
3968
3969 } else if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Sparse) {
3970 if (this->_impl->elem_exists(locator)) {
3971 T aux; // [workaround] use aux to dispatch.
3972 return this->_impl->at_for_sparse(locator, aux);
3973 } else {
3974 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR][SparseUniTensor] invalid location. break qnum block.%s",
3975 "\n");
3976 }
3977 } else {
3978 return this->get_block_().at<T>(locator);
3979 }
3980 }
3981
3982 template <class T>
3983 const T &at(const std::vector<std::string> &labels,
3984 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const {
3985 // giving label <-> locator one to one corresponding, return the element:
3986 cytnx_error_msg(locator.size() != labels.size(),
3987 "[ERROR][at] length of list should be the same for label and locator.%s",
3988 "\n");
3989 cytnx_error_msg(
3990 labels.size() != this->rank(),
3991 "[ERROR][at] length of lists must be the same as UniTensor.rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
3992 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_locator(this->rank());
3993 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
3994 for (int i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
3995 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), labels[i]);
3996 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
3997 "[ERROR] label:%s does not exist in current UniTensor.\n",
3998 labels[i].c_str());
3999 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
4000 new_locator[new_loc] = locator[i];
4001 }
4002 return this->at<T>(new_locator);
4003 }
4004 template <class T>
4005 T &at(const std::vector<std::string> &labels, const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) {
4006 // giving label <-> locator one to one corresponding, return the element:
4007 cytnx_error_msg(locator.size() != labels.size(),
4008 "[ERROR][at] length of list should be the same for label and locator.%s",
4009 "\n");
4010 cytnx_error_msg(
4011 labels.size() != this->rank(),
4012 "[ERROR][at] length of lists must be the same as UniTensor.rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
4013 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_locator(this->rank());
4014 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
4015 for (int i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
4016 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), labels[i]);
4017 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
4018 "[ERROR] label:%s does not exist in current UniTensor.\n",
4019 labels[i].c_str());
4020 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
4021 new_locator[new_loc] = locator[i];
4022 }
4023 return this->at<T>(new_locator);
4024 }
4025
4033 const Scalar::Sproxy at(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const {
4034 if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Block || this->uten_type() == UTenType.BlockFermionic) {
4035 return this->_impl->at_for_sparse(locator);
4036 } else if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Sparse) {
4037 if (this->_impl->elem_exists(locator)) {
4038 return this->_impl->at_for_sparse(locator);
4039 } else {
4040 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR][SparseUniTensor] invalid location. break qnum block.%s",
4041 "\n");
4042 }
4043 } else {
4044 return this->get_block_().at(locator);
4045 }
4046 }
4047
4055 Scalar::Sproxy at(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) {
4056 if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Block || this->uten_type() == UTenType.BlockFermionic) {
4057 return this->_impl->at_for_sparse(locator);
4058 } else if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Sparse) {
4059 if (this->_impl->elem_exists(locator)) {
4060 return this->_impl->at_for_sparse(locator);
4061 } else {
4062 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR][SparseUniTensor] invalid location. break qnum block.%s",
4063 "\n");
4064 }
4065 } else {
4066 return this->get_block_().at(locator);
4067 }
4068 }
4069
4070 Scalar::Sproxy at(const std::vector<std::string> &labels,
4071 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) {
4072 // giving label <-> locator one to one corresponding, return the element:
4073 cytnx_error_msg(locator.size() != labels.size(),
4074 "[ERROR][at] length of list should be the same for label and locator.%s",
4075 "\n");
4076 cytnx_error_msg(
4077 labels.size() != this->rank(),
4078 "[ERROR][at] length of lists must be the same as UniTensor.rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
4079 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_locator(this->rank());
4080 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
4081 for (int i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
4082 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), labels[i]);
4083 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
4084 "[ERROR] label:%s does not exist in current UniTensor.\n",
4085 labels[i].c_str());
4086 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
4087 new_locator[new_loc] = locator[i];
4088 }
4089 return this->at(new_locator);
4090 }
4091
4092 const Scalar::Sproxy at(const std::vector<std::string> &labels,
4093 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const {
4094 // giving label <-> locator one to one corresponding, return the element:
4095 cytnx_error_msg(locator.size() != labels.size(),
4096 "[ERROR][at] length of list should be the same for label and locator.%s",
4097 "\n");
4098 cytnx_error_msg(
4099 labels.size() != this->rank(),
4100 "[ERROR][at] length of lists must be the same as UniTensor.rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
4101 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_locator(this->rank());
4102 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
4103 for (int i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
4104 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), labels[i]);
4105 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
4106 "[ERROR] label:%s does not exist in current UniTensor.\n",
4107 labels[i].c_str());
4108 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
4109 new_locator[new_loc] = locator[i];
4110 }
4111 return this->at(new_locator);
4112 }
4113
4114 // return a copy of the block with the given block index
4123 Tensor get_block(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) const { return this->_impl->get_block(idx); };
4124 //================================
4125 // return a clone of block
4137 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx, const bool &force = false) const {
4138 return this->_impl->get_block(qidx, force);
4139 }
4140
4141 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<std::string> &labels, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx,
4142 const bool &force = false) const {
4143 cytnx_error_msg(
4144 labels.size() != qidx.size(),
4145 "[ERROR][get_block] length of lists must be the same for both lables and qnidices%s", "\n");
4146 cytnx_error_msg(labels.size() != this->rank(),
4147 "[ERROR][get_block] length of lists must be the rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
4148
4149 std::vector<cytnx_int64> loc_id(this->rank());
4150 std::vector<cytnx_int64> new_qidx(this->rank());
4151
4152 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
4153 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_order(this->rank());
4154 for (int i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
4155 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), labels[i]);
4156 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
4157 "[ERROR][get_block] label:%s does not exists in current Tensor.\n",
4158 labels[i].c_str());
4159 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
4160 new_qidx[new_loc] = qidx[i];
4161 new_order[i] = new_loc;
4162 }
4163 auto out = this->_impl->get_block(new_qidx, force);
4164 if (out.dtype() != Type.Void) out.permute_(new_order);
4165 return out;
4166 }
4167
4172 Tensor get_block(const std::initializer_list<cytnx_int64> &qnum,
4173 const bool &force = false) const {
4174 std::vector<cytnx_int64> tmp = qnum;
4175 return get_block(tmp, force);
4176 }
4177
4182 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &qnum, const bool &force = false) const {
4183 std::vector<cytnx_int64> iqnum(qnum.begin(), qnum.end());
4184 return this->_impl->get_block(iqnum, force);
4185 }
4186
4187 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<std::string> &labels, const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &qidx,
4188 const bool &force = false) const {
4189 std::vector<cytnx_int64> iqnum(qidx.begin(), qidx.end());
4190 return this->get_block(labels, iqnum, force);
4191 }
4192
4201 const Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) const {
4202 return this->_impl->get_block_(idx);
4203 }
4204
4209 Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) { return this->_impl->get_block_(idx); }
4210
4222 Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx, const bool &force = false) {
4223 return this->_impl->get_block_(qidx, force);
4224 }
4225
4242 // developer note: Tensor is not the same object (Thus Tensor instead of Tensor& ),
4243 // since we permute! but they have shared data memory.
4244 Tensor get_block_(const std::vector<std::string> &labels, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx,
4245 const bool &force = false) {
4246 cytnx_error_msg(
4247 labels.size() != qidx.size(),
4248 "[ERROR][get_block] length of lists must be the same for both lables and qnidices%s", "\n");
4249 cytnx_error_msg(labels.size() != this->rank(),
4250 "[ERROR][get_block] length of lists must be the rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
4251
4252 std::vector<cytnx_int64> loc_id(this->rank());
4253 std::vector<cytnx_int64> new_qidx(this->rank());
4254
4255 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
4256 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_order(this->rank());
4257 for (int i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
4258 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), labels[i]);
4259 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
4260 "[ERROR][get_block] label:%s does not exists in current Tensor.\n",
4261 labels[i].c_str());
4262 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
4263 new_qidx[new_loc] = qidx[i];
4264 new_order[i] = new_loc;
4265 }
4266 auto out = this->_impl->get_block_(new_qidx, force);
4267 if (out.dtype() != Type.Void) {
4268 out = out.permute(new_order);
4269 }
4270 return out;
4271 }
4272
4276 Tensor &get_block_(const std::initializer_list<cytnx_int64> &qidx, const bool &force = false) {
4277 std::vector<cytnx_int64> tmp = qidx;
4278 return get_block_(tmp, force);
4279 }
4280
4284 Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &qidx, const bool &force = false) {
4285 std::vector<cytnx_int64> iqidx(qidx.begin(), qidx.end());
4286 return get_block_(iqidx, force);
4287 }
4288
4289 Tensor get_block_(const std::vector<std::string> &labels, const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &qidx,
4290 const bool &force = false) {
4291 std::vector<cytnx_int64> iqidx(qidx.begin(), qidx.end());
4292 return get_block_(labels, iqidx, force);
4293 }
4294 //================================
4295
4296 // this only work for non-symm tensor. return a shared view of block
4300 const Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx,
4301 const bool &force = false) const {
4302 return this->_impl->get_block_(qidx, force);
4303 }
4304
4308 const Tensor &get_block_(const std::initializer_list<cytnx_int64> &qidx,
4309 const bool &force = false) const {
4310 std::vector<cytnx_int64> tmp = qidx;
4311 return this->_impl->get_block_(tmp, force);
4312 }
4313
4317 const Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &qidx,
4318 const bool &force = false) const {
4319 std::vector<cytnx_int64> iqidx(qidx.begin(), qidx.end());
4320 return get_block_(iqidx, force);
4321 }
4322
4323 //================================
4335 //[dev]
4336 std::vector<Tensor> get_blocks() const { return this->_impl->get_blocks(); }
4337
4346 //[dev]
4347 const std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &silent = false) const {
4348 return this->_impl->get_blocks_(silent);
4349 }
4350
4354 //[dev]
4355 std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &silent = false) {
4356 return this->_impl->get_blocks_(silent);
4357 }
4358
4368 UniTensor &put_block(const Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
4369 this->_impl->put_block(in, idx);
4370 return *this;
4371 }
4372
4383 UniTensor &put_block(const Tensor &in_tens, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx,
4384 const bool &force) {
4385 this->_impl->put_block(in_tens, qidx, force);
4386 return *this;
4387 }
4388
4397 UniTensor &put_block(Tensor &in, const std::vector<std::string> &lbls,
4398 const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx, const bool &force = false) {
4399 cytnx_error_msg(
4400 lbls.size() != qidx.size(),
4401 "[ERROR][put_block] length of lists must be the same for both lables and qnidices%s", "\n");
4402 cytnx_error_msg(lbls.size() != this->rank(),
4403 "[ERROR][put_block] length of lists must be the rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
4404
4405 std::vector<cytnx_int64> loc_id(this->rank());
4406 std::vector<cytnx_int64> new_qidx(this->rank());
4407
4408 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
4409 // std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_order(this->rank());
4410 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inv_order(this->rank());
4411 for (int i = 0; i < lbls.size(); i++) {
4412 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), lbls[i]);
4413 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
4414 "[ERROR][put_block] label:%s does not exists in current Tensor.\n",
4415 lbls[i].c_str());
4416 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
4417 new_qidx[new_loc] = qidx[i];
4418 // new_order[i] = new_loc;
4419 inv_order[new_loc] = i;
4420 }
4421 this->_impl->put_block(in.permute(inv_order), new_qidx, force);
4422 return *this;
4423 }
4424
4434 UniTensor &put_block_(Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
4435 this->_impl->put_block_(in, idx);
4436 return *this;
4437 }
4438
4449 UniTensor &put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx, const bool &force) {
4450 this->_impl->put_block_(in, qidx, force);
4451 return *this;
4452 }
4453
4462 UniTensor &put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<std::string> &lbls,
4463 const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx, const bool &force = false) {
4464 cytnx_error_msg(
4465 lbls.size() != qidx.size(),
4466 "[ERROR][put_block_] length of lists must be the same for both lables and qnidices%s",
4467 "\n");
4468 cytnx_error_msg(lbls.size() != this->rank(),
4469 "[ERROR][put_block_] length of lists must be the rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
4470
4471 std::vector<cytnx_int64> loc_id(this->rank());
4472 std::vector<cytnx_int64> new_qidx(this->rank());
4473
4474 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
4475 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_order(this->rank());
4476 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inv_order(this->rank());
4477 for (int i = 0; i < lbls.size(); i++) {
4478 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), lbls[i]);
4479 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
4480 "[ERROR][put_block_] label:%s does not exists in current Tensor.\n",
4481 lbls[i].c_str());
4482 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
4483 new_qidx[new_loc] = qidx[i];
4484 new_order[i] = new_loc;
4485 inv_order[new_loc] = i;
4486 }
4487 in.permute_(inv_order);
4488 this->_impl->put_block_(in, new_qidx, force);
4489 in.permute_(new_order);
4490 return *this;
4491 }
4492
4508 UniTensor get(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors) const {
4509 UniTensor out;
4510 out._impl = this->_impl->get(accessors);
4511 return out;
4512 }
4513
4518 UniTensor operator[](const std::vector<cytnx::Accessor> &accessors) const {
4519 UniTensor out;
4520 out._impl = this->_impl->get(accessors);
4521 return out;
4522 }
4523 UniTensor operator[](const std::initializer_list<cytnx::Accessor> &accessors) const {
4524 std::vector<cytnx::Accessor> acc_in = accessors;
4525 return this->get(acc_in);
4526 }
4527 UniTensor operator[](const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &accessors) const {
4528 std::vector<cytnx::Accessor> acc_in;
4529 for (cytnx_int64 i = 0; i < accessors.size(); i++) {
4530 acc_in.push_back(cytnx::Accessor(accessors[i]));
4531 }
4532 return this->get(acc_in);
4533 }
4534 UniTensor operator[](const std::initializer_list<cytnx_int64> &accessors) const {
4535 std::vector<cytnx_int64> acc_in = accessors;
4536 return (*this)[acc_in];
4537 }
4538
4555 UniTensor &set(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors, const Tensor &rhs) {
4556 this->_impl->set(accessors, rhs);
4557 return *this;
4558 }
4559 UniTensor &set(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors, const UniTensor &rhs) {
4560 cytnx_error_msg(
4561 rhs.uten_type() != UTenType.Dense,
4562 "[ERROR] Cannot set elements from UniTensor with symmetry. Use at() instead.%s", "\n");
4563 cytnx_error_msg(this->is_diag(), "[ERROR] Cannot set UniTensor with is_diag=True.%s", "\n");
4564 cytnx_error_msg(rhs.is_diag(),
4565 "[ERROR] Cannot set UniTensor. incoming UniTensor is_diag=True.%s", "\n");
4566
4567 this->_impl->set(accessors, rhs.get_block());
4568 return *this;
4569 }
4570
4578 UniTensor reshape(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape, const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0) {
4579 UniTensor out;
4580 out._impl = this->_impl->reshape(new_shape, rowrank);
4581 return out;
4582 }
4583
4590 UniTensor &reshape_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape,
4591 const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0) {
4592 this->_impl->reshape_(new_shape, rowrank);
4593 return *this;
4594 }
4595
4606 UniTensor to_dense() {
4607 UniTensor out;
4608 out._impl = this->_impl->to_dense();
4609 return out;
4610 }
4611
4616 UniTensor &to_dense_() {
4617 this->_impl->to_dense_();
4618 return *this;
4619 }
4620

4627 "Please use "
4628 "combineBond(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force) "
4629 "instead.")]] void
4630 combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force,
4631 const bool &by_label) {
4632 this->_impl->combineBonds(indicators, force, by_label);
4633 }
4634

4641 "Please use "
4642 "combineBond(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force) "
4643 "instead.")]] void
4644 combineBonds(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = false) {
4645 this->_impl->combineBonds(indicators, force);
4646 }
4647
4653 [[deprecated(
4654 "Please use "
4655 "combineBond(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force) "
4656 "instead.")]] void
4657 combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force = false) {
4658 this->_impl->combineBonds(indicators, force);
4659 }
4660
4671 UniTensor &combineBond(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = false) {
4672 this->_impl->combineBond(indicators, force);
4673 return *this;
4674 }
4675
4694 UniTensor contract(const UniTensor &inR, const bool &mv_elem_self = false,
4695 const bool &mv_elem_rhs = false) const {
4696 UniTensor out;
4697 out._impl = this->_impl->contract(inR._impl, mv_elem_self, mv_elem_rhs);
4698 return out;
4699 }

4721
4726 bool same_data(const UniTensor &rhs) const {
4727 // check same type:
4728 if (this->_impl->uten_type() != rhs._impl->uten_type()) return false;
4729
4730 return this->_impl->same_data(rhs._impl);
4731 }
4732

4750 this->_impl->Add_(rhs._impl);
4751 return *this;
4752 }

4772 return *this;

4792 this->_impl->Sub_(rhs._impl);
4793 return *this;
4794 }

4813 this->_impl->Div_(rhs._impl);
4814 return *this;
4815 }

4828 this->_impl->Add_(rhs);
4829 return *this;

4844 return *this;
4845 }

4857 UniTensor &Sub_(const Scalar &rhs) {
4858 this->_impl->Sub_(rhs);
4859 return *this;
4860 }

4872 UniTensor &Div_(const Scalar &rhs) {

5006
5022 UniTensor &operator+=(const UniTensor &rhs) {
5023 this->Add_(rhs);
5024 return *this;
5025 }
5026
5042 UniTensor &operator-=(const UniTensor &rhs) {
5043 this->Sub_(rhs);
5044 return *this;
5045 }
5046
5062 UniTensor &operator/=(const UniTensor &rhs) {
5063 this->Div_(rhs);
5064 return *this;
5065 }
5066
5082 UniTensor &operator*=(const UniTensor &rhs) {
5083 this->Mul_(rhs);
5084 return *this;
5085 }
5086
5097 UniTensor &operator+=(const Scalar &rhs) {
5098 this->Add_(rhs);
5099 return *this;
5100 }
5101
5112 UniTensor &operator-=(const Scalar &rhs) {
5113 this->Sub_(rhs);
5114 return *this;
5115 }
5116
5127 UniTensor &operator/=(const Scalar &rhs) {
5128 this->Div_(rhs);
5129 return *this;
5130 }
5131
5142 UniTensor &operator*=(const Scalar &rhs) {
5143 this->Mul_(rhs);
5144 return *this;
5145 }
5146
5171 UniTensor Inv(double clip = -1.) const;
5172
5197 UniTensor &Inv_(double clip = -1.);
5198
5206 UniTensor Conj() const {
5207 UniTensor out;
5208 out._impl = this->_impl->Conj();
5209 return out;
5210 }
5211
5219 UniTensor &Conj_() {
5220 this->_impl->Conj_();
5221 return *this;
5222 }
5223
5237 UniTensor Transpose() const {
5238 UniTensor out;
5239 out._impl = this->_impl->Transpose();
5240 return out;
5241 }
5242
5250 UniTensor &Transpose_() {
5251 this->_impl->Transpose_();
5252 return *this;
5253 }
5254
5261 UniTensor normalize() const {
5262 UniTensor out;
5263 out._impl = this->_impl->normalize();
5264 return out;

5266
5273 UniTensor &normalize_() {
5274 this->_impl->normalize_();

5277
5287 UniTensor Trace(const std::string &a, const std::string &b) const {
5288 UniTensor out;
5289 out._impl = this->_impl->Trace(a, b);
5290 return out;
5291 }
5292
5302 UniTensor Trace(const cytnx_int64 &a = 0, const cytnx_int64 &b = 1) const {
5303 UniTensor out;
5304 out._impl = this->_impl->Trace(a, b);
5305 return out;
5306 }
5307
5317 UniTensor &Trace_(const std::string &a, const std::string &b) {
5318 this->_impl->Trace_(a, b);
5319 if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Block || this->uten_type() == UTenType.BlockFermionic) {
5320 // handle if no leg left case for BlockUniTensor.
5321 if (this->rank() == 0) {
5322 DenseUniTensor *tmp = new DenseUniTensor();
5323 tmp->_block = this->get_blocks_(true)[0];
5324 this->_impl = boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(tmp);
5325 }
5326 }
5327 return *this;
5328 }
5329
5339 UniTensor &Trace_(const cytnx_int64 &a = 0, const cytnx_int64 &b = 1) {
5340 this->_impl->Trace_(a, b);
5341 if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Block || this->uten_type() == UTenType.BlockFermionic) {
5342 // handle if no leg left case for BlockUniTensor.
5343 if (this->rank() == 0) {
5344 DenseUniTensor *tmp = new DenseUniTensor();
5345 tmp->_block = this->get_blocks_(true)[0];
5346 this->_impl = boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(tmp);
5347 }
5348 }
5349 return *this;
5350 }
5351
5360 UniTensor Dagger() const {
5361 UniTensor out;
5362 out._impl = this->_impl->Dagger();
5363 return out;
5364 }
5365
5374 UniTensor &Dagger_() {
5375 this->_impl->Dagger_();
5376 return *this;
5377 }
5378
5387 UniTensor &tag() {
5388 this->_impl->tag();
5389 return *this;
5390 }

5407 UniTensor Pow(const double &p) const;
5408
5424 UniTensor &Pow_(const double &p);

5432 bool elem_exists(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const {
5433 return this->_impl->elem_exists(locator);
5434 }

5441 template <class T>
5442 [[deprecated("Use at() instead.")]] T get_elem(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const {

5452 [[deprecated("Use at() instead.")]] UniTensor &set_elem(

5454 // cytnx_error_msg(true,"[ERROR] invalid type%s","\n");

5518 return *this;

5530 UniTensor truncate(const std::string &label, const cytnx_uint64 &dim) const {

5533 return out;
5534 }
5535
5545 UniTensor truncate(const cytnx_int64 &bond_idx, const cytnx_uint64 &dim) const {

5579 vec2d<cytnx_uint64> &get_itoi() { return this->_impl->get_itoi(); }
5580
5582 void _Load(std::fstream &f);
5583 void _Save(std::fstream &f) const;
5585
5586 UniTensor &convert_from(const UniTensor &rhs, const bool &force = false,
5587 const cytnx_double &tol = 1e-14) {
5588 this->_impl->from_(rhs._impl, force, tol);
5589 return *this;
5590 }
5591
5592 // Generators:
5605 static UniTensor zeros(const cytnx_uint64 &Nelem,
5606 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5607 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5608 const std::string &name = "") {
5609 return UniTensor(cytnx::zeros(Nelem, dtype, device), false, -1, in_labels, name);
5610 }
5611
5625 static UniTensor zeros(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &shape,
5626 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5627 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5628 const std::string &name = "") {
5629 return UniTensor(cytnx::zeros(shape, dtype, device), false, -1, in_labels, name);
5630 }
5631
5643 static UniTensor ones(const cytnx_uint64 &Nelem, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5644 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5645 const std::string &name = "") {
5646 return UniTensor(cytnx::ones(Nelem, dtype, device), false, -1, in_labels, name);
5647 }
5648
5662 static UniTensor identity(const cytnx_uint64 &dim,
5663 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5664 const cytnx_bool &is_diag = false,
5665 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
5666 const int &device = Device.cpu, const std::string &name = "") {
5667 if (is_diag) {
5668 return UniTensor(cytnx::ones(dim, dtype, device), is_diag, -1, in_labels, name);
5669 } else {
5670 return UniTensor(cytnx::identity(dim, dtype, device), is_diag, -1, in_labels, name);
5671 }
5672 }
5673
5689 static UniTensor eye(const cytnx_uint64 &dim, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5690 const cytnx_bool &is_diag = false, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
5691 const int &device = Device.cpu, const std::string &name = "") {
5692 return identity(dim, in_labels, is_diag, dtype, device, name);
5693 }
5694
5707 static UniTensor ones(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &shape,
5708 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5709 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5710 const std::string &name = "") {
5711 return UniTensor(cytnx::ones(shape, dtype, device), false, -1, in_labels, name);
5712 }
5713
5728 static UniTensor arange(const cytnx_int64 &Nelem,
5729 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5730 const std::string &name = "") {
5731 return UniTensor(cytnx::arange(Nelem), false, -1, in_labels, name);
5732 }
5733
5751 static UniTensor arange(const cytnx_double &start, const cytnx_double &end,
5752 const cytnx_double &step = 1,
5753 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5754 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5755 const std::string &name = "") {
5756 return UniTensor(cytnx::arange(start, end, step, dtype, device), false, -1, in_labels, name);
5757 }
5758
5778 static UniTensor linspace(const cytnx_double &start, const cytnx_double &end,
5779 const cytnx_uint64 &Nelem, const bool &endpoint = true,
5780 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5781 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
5782 const int &device = Device.cpu, const std::string &name = "") {
5783 return UniTensor(cytnx::linspace(start, end, Nelem, endpoint, dtype, device), false, -1,
5784 in_labels, name);
5785 }
5786
5787 // Random Generators:
5806 static UniTensor normal(const cytnx_uint64 &Nelem, const double &mean, const double &std,
5807 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5808 const unsigned int &seed = cytnx::random::__static_random_device(),
5809 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5810 const std::string &name = "");
5811
5830 static UniTensor normal(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &shape, const double &mean,
5831 const double &std, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5832 const unsigned int &seed = cytnx::random::__static_random_device(),
5833 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5834 const std::string &name = "");
5835
5854 static UniTensor uniform(const cytnx_uint64 &Nelem, const double &low, const double &high,
5855 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5856 const unsigned int &seed = cytnx::random::__static_random_device(),
5857 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
5858 const int &device = Device.cpu, const std::string &name = "");
5859
5897 static UniTensor uniform(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &shape, const double &low,
5898 const double &high, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5899 const unsigned int &seed = cytnx::random::__static_random_device(),
5900 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
5901 const int &device = Device.cpu, const std::string &name = "");
5902
5903 // Inplace Random Generators:
5916 UniTensor &normal_(const double &mean, const double &std,
5917 const unsigned int &seed = cytnx::random::__static_random_device());
5918
5931 UniTensor &uniform_(const double &low = 0, const double &high = 1,
5932 const unsigned int &seed = cytnx::random::__static_random_device());
5933
5934 }; // class UniTensor
5935
5937 std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &os, const UniTensor &in);
5939
5952 UniTensor Contract(const UniTensor &inL, const UniTensor &inR, const bool &cacheL = false,
5953 const bool &cacheR = false);
5954
5967 UniTensor Contract(const std::vector<UniTensor> &TNs, const std::string &order,
5968 const bool &optimal);
5969
5975 [[deprecated(
5976 "Please use "
5977 "UniTensor Contract(const std::vector<UniTensor> &TNs, const std::string &order, const bool "
5978 "&optimal) "
5979 "instead.")]] UniTensor
5980 Contracts(const std::vector<UniTensor> &TNs, const std::string &order, const bool &optimal);
5981
5983 void _resolve_CT(std::vector<UniTensor> &TNlist);
5984 template <class... T>
5985 void _resolve_CT(std::vector<UniTensor> &TNlist, const UniTensor &in, const T &...args) {
5986 TNlist.push_back(in);
5987 _resolve_CT(TNlist, args...);
5988 }
5990
6002 template <class... T>
6003 UniTensor Contract(const UniTensor &in, const T &...args, const std::string &order,
6004 const bool &optimal) {
6005 std::vector<UniTensor> TNlist;
6006 _resolve_CT(TNlist, in, args...);
6007 return Contract(TNlist, order, optimal);
6008 }
6009
6015 template <class... T>
6016 [[deprecated(
6017 "Please use "
6018 "UniTensor Contract(const UniTensor &in, const T &...args, const std::string &order, const "
6019 "bool &optimal) "
6020 "instead.")]] UniTensor
6021 Contracts(const UniTensor &in, const T &...args, const std::string &order,
6022 const bool &optimal) {
6023 std::vector<UniTensor> TNlist;
6024 _resolve_CT(TNlist, in, args...);
6025 return Contracts(TNlist, order, optimal);
6026 }
6027
6028} // namespace cytnx
